title: North Area Operations Manager - Hub Operations, SPX Express
description:
Quản lý toàn trình của hoạt động Vận hành từ đầu đến cuối tại khu vực được giao. Đảm bảo hiệu quả chi phí, hiệu suất khu vực cũng như năng lực và năng suất của con người ở mức hiệu quả tối ưu.
Quản lý hiệu quả các bưu cục được giao để đảm bảo SLA, cải thiện năng suất và kiểm soát quy trình.
Phụ trách các hoạt động cải tiến vận hành bằng cách theo dõi, cải thiện và cam kết đạt tất cả các KPIs.
Đào sâu và thúc đẩy hiệu quả vận hành toàn trình (bao gồm các sự kiện) và có các đề xuất tối ưu hóa liên tục mô hình vận hành.
Chịu trách nhiệm làm việc với các đội ngũ khác nhằm đảm bảo mục tiêu chung, tiết giảm chi phí và đề đạt sáng kiến.
Xác định các vấn đề trong kế hoạch vận hành để báo cáo cho các bên liên quan. Đồng thời thực hiện theo dõi, giám sát giải pháp để đảm bảo kế hoạch được thực hiện đúng.
Những công việc khác được Công ty giao tùy từng thời điểm.
Bằng cấp trong lĩnh vực Kinh doanh, Quản lý Chuỗi Cung ứng, Kỹ thuật hoặc các ngành liên quan là một lợi thế.
Có ít nhất 7 năm kinh nghiệm, trong đó ít nhất 5 năm kinh nghiệm trong lĩnh vực logistics/ quản lý chuỗi cung ứng là yêu cầu bắt buộc và ít nhất 2 năm ở vị trí Quản lý đội nhóm.
Có kỹ năng lãnh đạo và quản lý tốt để quản lý các đội nhóm lớn, thúc đẩy sự hợp tác và tạo ra sự đồng thuận giữa các nhóm khác nhau.
Có khả năng tự quản lý đội ngũ vận hành, tham gia các cuộc thảo luận với các bên liên quan nội bộ và bên ngoài.
Có tư duy kinh doanh nhạy bén, khả năng lập kế hoạch và chiến lược tốt
Có khả năng phân tích để xem xét và xác định thông tin liên quan, và chuyển những thông tin này thành các kế hoạch vận hành rõ ràng.
Chú ý đến chi tiết với độ chính xác và chất lượng cao.
Có khả năng học hỏi nhanh, thích ứng tốt trong môi trường linh hoạt.
Kỹ năng giao tiếp và thuyết trình tốt, có thể giao tiếp hiệu quả với các bên liên quan ở mọi cấp độ.
Có khả năng thực hiện công việc trực tiếp, sẵn sàng và có thể di chuyển giữa các địa điểm khác nhau để đảm bảo hoạt động vận hành diễn ra suôn sẻ.

title: Hub Team Lead (Trưởng Nhóm Trạm Giao Nhận) Miền Bắc - Hub Operations, SPX Express
description:
Quản lý, chia tuyến, đào tạo, hướng dẫn đội ngũ tài xế xe máy (rider) tại trạm.
Giám sát, hướng dẫn công việc, sắp xếp nhân viên Điều phối làm việc theo ca tại trạm giao nhận.
Quản lý hành trình đơn hàng giao, lấy, trả đúng với tiêu chuẩn và quy định công ty.
Chủ động xử lý các sự cố phát sinh hằng ngày trong phạm vi công việc tại trạm giao nhận. Đưa ra các hướng dẫn và các giải pháp thiết thực tại các trạm giao nhận được phụ trách.
Chịu trách nhiệm truyền tải, trao đổi thông tin, phổ biến quy trình, quy định chung của công ty đến nhóm nhân viên làm việc tại trạm.
Báo cáo hoạt động giao hàng định kỳ theo yêu cầu của Quản lý trực tiếp và đề xuất hướng giải quyết nếu có.
Những công việc khác được Công ty giao tùy từng thời điểm.
Có ít nhất 6 tháng tại vị trí tương tự (có liên quan đến Logistic, chuỗi cung ứng, vận chuyển,...)
Có kinh nghiệm về quản lý đội nhóm
Hiểu và nắm rõ về các tuyến đường trong địa bàn
Có kinh nghiệm sử dụng hệ thống quản lý đơn hàng
Có khả năng đọc hiểu, làm báo cáo và phân tích dữ liệu bằng Excel
Có khả năng xoay ca và làm việc 6 ngày 1 tuần (không nghỉ cố định chủ nhật).
Có thể làm việc tại các tỉnh miền Bắc

title: Senior Leasing Associate, SPX Express
description:
Ensure successful leasing of hubs in line with commercial terms and business operations.
Manage strong relationships with organisational internal stakeholders and external Landlords to facilitate leasing related requests on-time
Ensure the leasing process is effectively implemented, including document checking, contract management to payments.
Ensure on-time status updates and communication to relevant teams during the process
Ensure a correct database for Leasing information, Landlord profiles and contract information to facilitate information retrieval and ensure a proper follow-up.
Work with the operations team in transitioning from executed contracts through to the handover of tenant spaces and commencement of fit out, though to operating.
Support administrative tasks during Procurement processes, including contract administration, payment processing and database maintenance
Degree in business administration, facility management, or a related field preferred.
Minimum of 03 years of experience in Leasing.
Commercial and negotiation skills and ability to understand contracts.
Strong organisational and administrative skills.
Highly motivated with a desire to learn
Attention to detail, the ability to multitask
Good at problem solving and stakeholder management.
Be opened, flexible and enjoyed fast-paced environment

title: Business Transformation PMO - SPX Express
description:
You will lead high-impact transformation initiatives within Operations, with a strong focus on AI-driven solutions and cost optimization. This role requires both strategic thinking and hands-on execution to drive measurable improvements in operational efficiency, cost structure, and user experience.
Own and lead end-to-end transformation projects across Operations, from problem definition to execution and impact delivery.
Identify and prioritize AI-driven opportunities (e.g., process automation, ops productivity tools, demand forecasting) and drive pilot-to-scale implementation.
Translate ambiguous business problems into structured hypotheses, clear success metrics, and execution roadmaps.
Conduct deep-dive analysis on cost drivers, operational performance, and user behavior to uncover actionable insights.
Lead cross-functional alignment with multiple stakeholders to ensure execution quality and timeline commitment.
Proactively identify risks, inefficiencies, and bottlenecks; drive practical, scalable solutions.
Manage stakeholders at multiple levels, including senior leadership, with clear and concise communication.
Mentor junior team members and elevate overall team execution standards.
5-8 years of experience in consulting, strategy, transformation, or operations roles
Proven track record of leading complex, cross-functional projects independently
Strong analytical capability with experience working on data-driven problem solving
Exposure to AI/automation or cost optimization initiatives is highly preferred
Strong stakeholder management, especially with senior stakeholders
Hands-on, structured, and comfortable with ambiguity in fast-paced environments

title: Driver Operations, ShopeeFood (Da Nang)
description:
1.Driver Recruitment (75%)
Actively source new driver candidates through social groups, online channels, and local recruitment activities.
Post recruitment content and maintain candidate pipeline for assigned areas.
Support potential drivers by providing clear information about the onboarding process and requirements.
Conduct online onboarding sessions via Zalo and answer driver questions in a timely manner.
Perform KYC checks and follow up on onboarding progress to ensure drivers are activated successfully.
Monitor uniform distribution and other onboarding-related processes for new drivers.
Handle recruitment-related tickets and provide timely updates or feedback for assigned areas.
Continuously track recruitment performance and identify issues in candidate conversion.
2. Driver Coordination Support (25%)
Support driver coordination in assigned cities/areas based on operational needs.
Monitor daily operational performance and promptly identify and report issues or potential risks that may impact operations (e.g., bad weather, events/campaigns, etc.).
Track and support improvements in driver-related operational metrics.
Good working proficiency in Google Sheets.
Comfortable working with numbers and operational data.
Able to read data, identify unusual patterns, and understand problems behind the numbers.
Strong attention to detail and ability to monitor situations continuously.
Fast response mindset and ability to adapt quickly in a dynamic environment.
At least 6 months of experience in operations, recruitment, logistics, delivery, ride-hailing, e-commerce, or other relevant industries.
Able to work proactively, independently, and effectively in a team.
Strong willingness to learn and take ownership.
Good operations mindset: fast, hands-on, continuous improvement, and data-driven.

title: Senior Associate, Operations Efficiency (South & Central) - SPX Express (HCM/Da Nang)
description:
Báo cáo
Chịu trách nhiệm về độ chính xác 100% trong các báo cáo hoạt động định kỳ theo ngày/tuần/tháng/năm.
Hỗ trợ Giám đốc khu vực (ROM) trong việc xây dựng các bảng thông tin số liệu, báo báo, các file theo dõi, v.v. có liên quan để kiểm soát KPI Trạm giao nhận hàng (Trạm)/Khu vực và kiểm soát các thành tích đạt được.
Đề xuất các sáng kiến mới giúp quản lý hiệu suất của các Trạm được giao và tối ưu hóa các hoạt động vận hành.
Giữ vai trò là đầu mối thay mặt ROM cung cấp dữ liệu/nhập liệu/thông tin cho các báo cáo khác của công ty theo phân công.
2. Dự án
Khởi xướng và hỗ trợ thực hiện những ý tưởng mới để phát triển các dự án trong nhiều lĩnh vực nhằm nâng cao hiệu quả vận hành.
Tham gia các dự án khác của công ty theo phân công và đóng vai trò là người kết nối, có hiểu biết toàn diện về hoạt động vận hành Trạm.
Phối hợp với các Bộ phận liên quan như Tối ưu vận hành, Mua sắm, Sản phẩm… để đảm bảo họ hiểu rõ về hoạt động vận hành của Hub và hỗ trợ họ theo phân công trong các dự án cụ thể.
Theo dõi phản hồi về các dự án đã triển khai và điều chỉnh kế hoạch để phù hợp nhất theo tình hình thực tế.
3. Kiểm soát và kiểm toán nội bộ
Đào sâu hiểu biết về SPX nói chung và các Trạm/khu vực được phân công nói riêng để chủ động xác định các vấn đề vận hành cần cải thiện.
Trực tiếp đi xuống các Trạm, điều tra các vấn đề phát sinh và báo cáo cho Giám đốc khu vực nhằm can thiệp kịp thời và có các hướng dẫn cần thiết.
Báo cáo cho ROM khi phát hiện bất kỳ sự bất thường hoặc không nhất quán nào trong hoạt động vận hành tại Trạm/khu vực.
Kiểm soát tốt các SOP/quy định và là người đào tạo nội bộ cho các Trạm/khu vực để hiểu rõ các SOP/quy định này khi được phân công.
4. Nhiệm vụ Hành chính
Phối hợp với các team trong khu vực và phụ trách các công việc hành chính cho toàn bộ khu vực, bao gồm nhưng không giới hạn việc tổ chức sự kiện, đặt mua văn phòng phẩm, kiểm soát đồng phục, hoàn tất thủ tục thanh toán và các nhiệm vụ phát sinh khác.
Chuẩn bị các đề xuất và soạn các bài thuyết trình theo phân công.
Làm việc tại HCM, Đà Nẵng
3 năm kinh nghiệm trong ngành với các thành tựu nhất định.
Có khả năng giao tiếp tốt với các Bộ phận liên quan.
Có kỹ năng phân tích dữ liệu (Excel, SQL, v.v.) và có hiểu biết về hoạt động vận hành ngành logistics là một lợi thế.
Có khả năng làm chủ dự án tốt, tư duy phân tích tốt, khả năng học hỏi nhanh và tinh thần hành động để thành công.
Có khả năng làm việc theo nhóm hoặc độc lập tốt.

title: Product Management Lead - SPX Express
description:
Product Strategy & Business Product Management
Drive product strategy by identifying business pain points and proposing scalable, innovative solutions that meet both user needs and business objectives.
Develop, maintain, and communicate a clear product roadmap aligned with strategic priorities.
Collaborate with stakeholders to prioritize initiatives based on value, feasibility, and impact.
Translate complex business requirements into actionable technical tasks for engineering teams.
Facilitate workshops, presentations, and stakeholder meetings to ensure alignment and clarity.
Partner with analytics and business stakeholders to derive insights from data and optimize product features.
Support end-to-end delivery of cross-functional initiatives that require product-led solutions.
2.
Product Operations Oversight
Oversee issue triaging, prioritization, and resolution workflows, ensuring business continuity and minimal disruption.
Guide and review the execution of UAT and post-release validation, ensuring thorough coverage of edge cases.
Ensure robust feature release processes, including documentation, guides, training, and stakeholder enablement.
Serve as the escalation point for complex product logic or functionality queries from business teams.
Lead initiatives to streamline product operations processes such as issue management, release planning, and feature rollout.
Champion continuous improvement in team practices, documentation standards, and tooling.
3.
Leadership & Team Management
Manage and mentor a hybrid team of Business Product Managers and Product Operations specialists.
Foster a high-performance, collaborative culture with a focus on ownership, accountability, and growth.
Guide team members through prioritization, stakeholder management, and problem-solving.
Drive coordination across cross-functional teams including Engineering, Design, Business, and Support.
Act as a bridge between strategic thinking and tactical execution.
5–7+ years of experience in product management, product operations, or related fields, with at least 2 years in a leadership or mentoring role.
Strong blend of business acumen and technical fluency; ability to navigate between strategic discussions and detailed execution.
Proven ability to develop and manage product roadmaps, align cross-functional stakeholders, and deliver complex projects on time.
Experience working closely with engineering and QA teams in an Agile/Scrum environment.
Exceptional communication skills—able to translate technical concepts into business language and vice versa.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with a bias for action and data-driven decision-making.
Experience with UAT, testing processes, and issue resolution management.
Comfortable managing ambiguity in a fast-paced, evolving environment.
Proficiency in tools such as Jira, Confluence, SQL (or similar querying tools), and product analytics platforms.
A proactive, hands-on leader who thrives in cross-functional settings and builds trust across teams.

title: Key Account Management (FBS - SME) - Business Development, Shopee (HN/HCM)
description:
Proactively engage with potential and existing sellers to pitch the value and benefits of Shopee Fulfillment Services (FBS) and engage sellers to join the FBS program.
Address seller concerns and feedback with clarity to ensure successful sign-ups, coordinate with internal teams to ensure a smooth and timely onboarding experience
Maintain a high level of product and process knowledge to provide accurate and consultative support to sellers
Other tasks as assigned
1 - 3 years experience in Key Account, Merchandiser, Business Development
Good at planning, analytical skills, and execution, can work with sellers to plan & achieve monthly/yearly commercial targets
Strong communication skills, able to prepare, lead and present in meetings with the seller
Logical thinking and strong problem-solving skills
Ability to interact with a broad set of businesses and stakeholders and present both over the phone and in person
Good team player, with an aptitude for sales and the ambition to constantly outperform your KPIs.

title: Workforce BPO Management - Operations, Shopee
description:
Analyze labor demand for warehouse operations to propose mid-term and long term labor structure.
Conduct labor market for temporary and permanent labor to understand market trend · Propose partnership model with vendors to improve labor fill rate for big campaign.
Conduct BPO agent performance reviews, cost/benefit analysis and other operational strategy assessments weekly & monthly.
Summarize, collect and analyze operations trends and data for regular performance reports.
Acting as a mediator between operation team and vendors/BPOs to balance operational requirements vs vendor partnership.
Monitor and execute daily tasks: BPO booking, recruitment.
Record working hours of BPO, reconcile BPO working hours vs actual warehouse labor hours, follow up payment to vendors.
Collaborate with operations team to improve BPO experience in our warehouse (working culture, equipment, facility).
Minimum 2-4 years working in an operational environment (warehouse, hub, factory…).
Good stakeholder management skill.
Attention to detail and being able to execute tasks with high accuracy.
Good Excel skill.
Being able to work flexible hours and provide constant support for operations team and vendors/BPOs.

title: Senior Strategic Project Management Officer - SPX Express
description:
1. Strategic Project Establishment
Support the Director in shaping, structuring, and mobilizing strategic initiatives across business functions, which are derived from Director priorities and business pain points, where business readiness and ownership model are not yet clearly defined.
Translate high-level leadership direction into clear project scope, objectives, milestones, governance model, and delivery plan.
Facilitate alignment across stakeholders to ensure clarity of objectives, success metrics, accountabilities, timelines and expected outcomes before transitioning initiatives to business teams.
Establish strong project foundations, including scope definition, RACI alignment, governance framework, and way of working to enable structured execution after handover to Business Owners.
Provide ongoing coordination and advisory support post-transition to ensure continuity and execution quality.
Drive project reviews and post-implementation assessments where required to capture learnings and improve future operating models.
2. Selective End-to-End Project Delivery
Lead large-scale, strategic and urgent or high-priority projects with significant cross-functional dependencies, ensuring full ownership of execution and delivery.
Drive tight alignment across stakeholders, proactively managing risks, dependencies, and bottlenecks to maintain momentum.
Ensure disciplined execution against timelines and targets, with a strong focus on delivering measurable business outcomes.
Drive problem solving, track action items, and manage stakeholder alignment during execution.
Act as the central point of accountability to unblock issues and drive decisions in fast-paced, high-pressure situations.
3. Business Market Intelligence
Consolidate market intelligence from multiple internal and external sources, including competitor activities, industry trends, customer/ market developments, operational benchmarks, and relevant ecosystem insights  from business teams to synthesize fragmented insights into a central Insights hub for leadership and business teams
Act as a central hub for managing and structuring business implications, ensuring alignment, visibility, and consistency across functions.
Translate insights into clear, actionable business implications, strategic considerations, risks and opportunities and communicate them effectively to leadership and relevant teams to support business planning and decision-making.
Continuously capture, curate, and share market updates, competitive movements, and key business learnings to strengthen organizational awareness and knowledge.
4. Executive Reporting & Leadership presentation
Own and coordinate periodic executive reporting for business performance, strategic initiatives, and leadership updates
Consolidate inputs from multiple teams into concise, structured, and decision-oriented reports for senior stakeholders.
Develop high-quality executive materials, including leadership decks, executive summaries, and briefing notes with clear, structured messaging for business reviews, leadership meetings, and executive forums.
Consolidate cross-functional inputs into concise, decision-oriented reports, highlighting key risks, trade-offs, and recommendations.
Drive reporting cadence (weekly/monthly/quarterly), ensuring accurate tracking of business performance, key initiatives, and follow-ups.
Continuously refine reporting frameworks, templates, and standards to improve clarity, consistency, and efficiency.
Raise the overall quality and consistency of executive communication materials through strong storyline development and data-driven presentation.
3-5 years of experience in PMO,  project management, consulting, business transformation, strategy and related roles
Experience in E-commerce, Logistics, Supply Chain, Operations, or other fast-paced execution-oriented industries is strongly preferred.
Proven experience in leading cross-functional strategic projects and/or setting up project governance frameworks.
Experience in executive reporting, leadership presentations, and management communications.
Experience in market intelligence, business analysis, or strategic planning is an advantage.
Strong sense of ownership; self-motivated, proactive in learning and able to work under pressure
Demonstrated willingness to explore new subjects and fully drive from feasibility study to implementation
Demonstrated ability to coordinate cross-functional projects involving senior stakeholders
Strong project management capability with ability to manage multiple initiatives simultaneously.
Strong organisational and coordination skills with high attention to detail.
Ability to structure ambiguous requests into clear workplans and deliverables.
Excellent verbal and written communication skills; presentation skills
Comfortable working in a dynamic, fast-changing environment with evolving priorities

title: Warehouse Admin (Location: Thuận Thành/Yên Phong, Bắc Ninh)
description:
Tạo PR/PO và theo dõi thanh toán, cấp phát cho hàng hóa, công cụ, nguyên vật liệu và văn phòng phẩm cho Kho.
Tạo PR/PO và theo dõi các chi phí cố định, phát sinh như thuê kho, điện, nước, rác, dịch vụ vệ sinh, bảo vệ, chuyển phát nhanh, sửa chữa...
Phối hợp kiểm tra và đánh giá tài sản, kiểm tra Capex theo kế hoạch hàng năm.
Lập kế hoạch ngân sách cho các hoạt động vận hành kho (hàng hóa, văn phòng phẩm,...).
Quản lý tồn kho và phân phối hàng hóa cho nhân viên kho (quà tặng công ty, đồ ăn nhẹ, đồng phục, tủ locker...).
Quản lý dịch vụ vệ sinh trong kho, bao gồm kiểm tra nhiệm vụ đầy đủ của họ, số lượng nhân viên tạp vụ và theo dõi sự hiện diện, điều phối công việc cho họ
Hỗ trợ nhóm kho trong các chiến dịch.
Phối hợp với bộ phận HSE, SEC về các vấn đề an toàn, an ninh, vệ sinh và kỷ luật tại nơi làm việc.
Phối hợp với bộ phận Nhân sự để theo dõi chốt công nhân viên FTE làm việc hàng tháng, thu thập các tài liệu liên quan đến nhân sự
Phối hợp với các bộ phận tổ chức các hoạt động văn hóa, phong trào đoàn kết tập thể.
Phối hợp với các bộ phận liên quan để đề xuất và phát triển các quy trình cho công tác hành chính/ kho.
Thực hiện các công việc khác theo sự phân công của quản lý trực tiếp.
Có ít nhất 1 năm kinh nghiệm trong lĩnh vực hành chính với mô tả công việc như trên.
Thành thạo Microsoft Office, đặc biệt là Excel.
Có khả năng giao tiếp và sử dụng tiếng Anh là một lợi thế.
Nhanh nhẹn, năng động và trung thực.
Sẵn sàng làm việc theo ca theo sự sắp xếp.

title: Assistant Manager, Infrastructure Development – Facility Readiness
description:
We are looking for an Assistant Manager – Infrastructure Development (Facility Readiness) to lead end-to-end facility and infrastructure projects across Sorting Center and Fulfillment warehouses sites nationwide. This role sits at the intersection of project management, site planning, construction oversight, and regional stakeholder collaboration.
This role is ideal for someone who thrives on managing complex, multi-site projects, is rigorous in driving standards compliance, and can translate regional requirements into practical, on-the-ground facility solutions.
1. Multi-Site BTS Project Management
Manage multiple Build-to-Suit (BTS) site projects concurrently, ensuring all milestones are delivered on time and in full across active sites.
Develop and own comprehensive project management plans covering scope definition, scheduling, budget forecasting, and resource allocation.
Proactively identify and mitigate project risks and dependencies; implement structured controls to prevent scope creep or delivery delays.
Track project progress through regular status reporting and dashboards; provide timely updates to senior management and cross-functional stakeholders.
2. Site Selection & Feasibility
Lead end-to-end site selection processes for new Sorting Centers and Fulfillment Warehouses, evaluating candidate locations against company facility standards and operational requirements.
Conduct thorough feasibility assessments covering geographic accessibility, structural suitability, MEP infrastructure capacity, and regulatory compliance.
Benchmark cost and lead-time trade-offs across shortlisted options, preparing data-driven proposals and presenting clear recommendations to leadership.
Collaborate with legal, finance, and procurement teams to support due diligence, lease negotiations, and vendor contracting for selected sites.
Partner with regional operations teams to gather, consolidate, and validate facility specification requirements, ensuring local needs are accurately captured in design and construction scopes.
3. Construction Monitoring & Facility Operations
Oversee construction and fit-out activities across new and existing facilities, conducting regular site visits to monitor quality, safety compliance, and progress against plan.
Coordinate planned and reactive maintenance programs for operational Sorting Centers and Fulfillment Warehouses to ensure facility uptime and regulatory compliance.
Bachelor’s degree or above in Business Administration, Supply Chain, Civil Engineering, Architecture, or a related discipline.
Minimum 4 years of professional experience in property management, project management, or facility development — preferably in large-scale logistics, e-commerce, or operations environments.
Demonstrated experience managing multiple concurrent infrastructure or construction projects across geographically dispersed locations.
Strong project management mindset with structured planning discipline; ability to manage scope, timelines, and budgets simultaneously.
Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills across all levels, including regional teams and senior leadership.
Strong critical thinking and analytical problem-solving skills; able to evaluate trade-offs and propose optimal solutions.
Resilient and adaptable; comfortable operating in a fast-changing, high-ambiguity environment.
Willingness and ability to travel extensively across the country for site selection and facility deployments.
Experience in MEP systems, construction quality assurance (QA), and regulatory compliance monitoring.
Proficiency in AutoCAD or equivalent design/review tools.
Project Management Professional (PMP) certification or equivalent
Advanced English proficiency; international working experience is an advantage.

title: Assistant Manager/Senior Product Management - ShopeeFood
description:
Troubleshooting pain points from both business needs and product performance angles
Identifying and exploring new product opportunities, leveraging emerging technologies and market trends
Ensure features from design to live stage are well aligned with the end goals crafted
Tracking the key and supporting product metrics, in line with overall business metrics to measure product performance and drive continuous improvement
Collaborating with Regional PMs & Developers to ensure product feature roadmaps are delivered on time in full
Collaborating with Local Business cross functional teams to identify the key questions and improvements to be delivered through features initiatives & development.
Consolidate user and department feedback and compose process/product feature improvements.
Deliver new initiatives/solutions, implement usage initiatives targeting business strategy.
Priority to assure that all requirements are supported in a cost-effective, timely manner, with a resulting high level of User satisfaction;
Execute end-user web and mobile testing if needed.
BA/BS degree in Information Technology, Computer Science or Engineering, 3+ years of experience as product manager in a product management, engineering and technology strategy role.
Ability to work effectively with cross functional teams.
Good communication and presentation skills, can convert business feedback into technical requirements and vice versa.
Good understanding of business model(s) of any fields;
Data-driven, able to make use of either raw data, data charts/dashboards and funnels to get proper insights.
Strong problem solving skills, critical thinking and willingness to roll up one's sleeves to get the job done.
Eager to learn about technologies and the ecommerce industry.
Proficiency in English is a must
Proficiency in Chinese Mandarin is a plus

title: Workforce Partnership & Governance Lead - SPX Express
description:
The Workforce Partnership & Governance Lead is responsible for leading workforce campaign execution, developing partnership networks, ensuring internal and external compliance, and managing external relations on labor-facing matters. This role plays a critical part in strengthening operational governance, driving stakeholder collaboration, and supporting sustainable workforce initiatives.
1. Workforce Campaign Execution
Lead the end-to-end execution of workforce campaigns to support activation, retention, or other labor related operational priorities.
Coordinate cross-functional stakeholders to ensure campaign readiness and smooth execution.
Track campaign performance, identify gaps, and drive follow-up actions to improve effectiveness and efficiency.
Monitor campaign risks, operational issues, and field feedback, and propose timely corrective actions.
Consolidate post-campaign insights and recommendations to improve future workforce initiatives.
Support the development of standard processes, playbooks, and reporting frameworks for partnership and campaign management.
2. Partnership Network Development
Build, expand, and manage a network of external partners that can support workforce retention and labor related initiatives.
Establish collaboration models, engagement plans, and operating mechanisms with partners.
Identify potential partnership opportunities and evaluate partner capability, reach, and fit with business needs.
Maintain strong and sustainable relationships with key partners to ensure ongoing support and responsiveness.
Drive partner performance tracking and partnership effectiveness reviews.
Explore new channels and partnership models to strengthen workforce pipeline and campaign reach.
Other tasks that assigned by management team
3. Workforce compliance and Governance
Develop and implement governance frameworks, policies, and control mechanisms to ensure workforce compliance with company rules and operational standards.
Design and maintain disciplinary frameworks, including reward and penalty mechanisms, to promote employee compliance and manage violations appropriately.
Define violation categories, treatment principles, and escalation processes for workforce-related misconduct or non-compliance.
Partner with relevant teams to investigate, review, and resolve employee violation cases in a fair, consistent, and well-documented manner.
Monitor compliance trends, root causes of repeated violations, and control effectiveness, then recommend preventive actions and policy improvements.
Manage external relations on labor-facing topics, including coordination with relevant external stakeholders and authorities where needed
Drive governance, risk monitoring, and cross-functional alignment across workforce-related workstreams
3 - 5+ Experience in partnership management, business development, operations, HR, or related fields.
Strong project management and stakeholder management skills.
Ability to manage multiple campaigns or initiatives in a fast-paced environment.
Strong analytical thinking with the ability to turn data and field insights into actions.
Structured, proactive, and able to influence stakeholders both in English and Vietnamese
Excellent communication, coordination, and relationship-building skills.
Comfortable traveling is a plus

title: Recruiter - People Team, SPX Express (HCM)
description:
Phối hợp chặt chẽ với các bộ phận liên quan để lập kế hoạch và thực hiện toàn bộ quy trình tuyển dụng nhằm mang lại nhiều nhân tài nhất.
Sáng tạo, điều chỉnh các giải pháp nhằm tối ưu hóa quy trình tạo nguồn, sàng lọc và tuyển chọn những nhân sự phù hợp trên các nền tảng tuyển dụng.
Thiết kế và triển khai các hoạt động thu hút và gắn kết với các ứng viên (chủ động và không chủ động).
Quản lý và duy trì các dữ liệu tuyển dụng bao gồm: nhu cầu và tình hình nguồn lực, các hoạt động tạo nguồn, sự kiện tuyển dụng
Phối hợp với các thành viên trong team triển khai xây dựng thương hiệu tuyển dụng và nâng cao hiệu suất công việc.
Thực hiện các công việc liên quan cho quá trình nhận việc của ứng viên.
Thực hiện các nhiệm vụ liên quan được giao bởi Quản lý.
Học vấn: Cử nhân trở lên.
Có ít nhất 2 năm trở lên trong lĩnh vực tuyển dụng, ưu tiên kinh nghiệm tuyển dụng số lượng lớn và trong ngành dịch vụ vận chuyển
Có khả năng giao tiếp tốt.
Có khả năng làm việc độc lập, cường độ cao.
Có thái độ tích cực, khả năng thích nghi và học hỏi nhanh.
Có khả năng tạo nguồn tốt và biết đưa ra giải pháp để xử lý vấn đề.

title: Inventory Network Planning, Senior Associate - Operations, Shopee
description:
Job summary:
The Inventory Network Planning role owns network-level inventory positioning decisions across a large-scale, multi-warehouse logistics network.
Operating at the intersection of demand, supply, and network design, this role makes high-impact decisions on inventory re-allocation that directly shape service level, logistics cost, and inventory efficiency at scale. You will act as a decision owner, translating complex signals into clear, data-driven inventory actions across the network.
What will you do
Own and contribute to network-level inventory positioning decisions across warehouses, based on demand and supply signals.
Identify structural inventory imbalances and determine optimal re-allocation strategies at scale.
Make and justify trade-off decisions between service level, inventory coverage, warehouse capacity, and transfer cost.
Steer inventory health outcomes (e.g. DOH/WOS, aging, shortage) across the network, not just at individual warehouses.
Partner with Operations and Planning teams to ensure planning decisions are translated into effective and consistent execution.
Continuously refine planning logic, assumptions, and decision frameworks to improve network performance over time.
Must have
Bachelor’s degree in Supply Chain, Business, Engineering, Economics, or related fields.
1–4+ years of experience in inventory planning, supply demand planning, consulting or related fields.
Strong problem-solving, analytical, and structured thinking skills.
Ability to make data-driven planning decisions in ambiguous situations.
Comfortable owning high-impact decisions affecting multiple warehouses and stakeholders.
Resilience under pressure and high adaptability in a fast-changing environment.
Clear communication and stakeholder coordination skills.
Strong Excel or data analysis skills; experience with BI or SQL is a plus.
Nice to have
Exposure to large-scale, multi-warehouse logistics networks or regional supply chains.
Experience collaborating with cross-functional stakeholders (Operations, Planning, BI, Tech).
Ability to communicate insights clearly and confidently in English

title: Sorting Supervisor - Operations, SPX Express (Location: Hanoi, Bac Ninh, Hung Yen)
description:
Địa điểm làm việc : Vsip Bắc Ninh
Giám sát các hoạt động hàng ngày của trung tâm phân loại (có thể là một ca làm việc, một khu vực hoặc một nhóm), bao gồm lập kế hoạch, bố trí nhân sự và quản lý quy trình làm việc.
Theo dõi và báo cáo về các chỉ số quan trọng của Vận hành như: volume, thời gian xử lý, tỷ lệ đúng hạn và tỷ lệ lỗi, đồng thời thực hiện hành động khắc phục khi cần.
Đảm bảo tuân thủ tính công bằng, an toàn, bảo mật khi xử lý các vấn đề liên quan đến con người và vi phạm trong quá trình vận hành, tuân theo quy trình và các chính sách của công ty.
Tham gia tuyển dụng, đào tạo và phát triển các thành viên trong nhóm, đồng thời cung cấp huấn luyện và phản hồi liên tục để đảm bảo hiệu suất và mức độ gắn kết cao.
Phối hợp với các bộ phận khác và các bên liên quan để đảm bảo hoạt động trơn tru, hiệu quả và giải quyết các vấn đề khi phát sinh.
Đảm bảo tính chính xác khi sử dụng các công cụ, thiết bị và khi thực hiện các báo cáo, tracker, kết quả làm việc của nhân viên.
Luôn tìm thấy những cơ hội để cải tiến hệ thống làm việc, quy trình làm việc, quản lý chi phí, kế hoạch sử dụng và bố trí nhân lực,... và triển khai các giải pháp để nâng cao hiệu quả và năng suất.
Xử lý các dự án, yêu cầu đột xuất theo sự phân công của quản lý cấp trên.
Tốt nghiệp Cao đẳng trở lên
Có ít nhất 2 năm kinh nghiệm trong vận hành ở cty vận tải hay kinh nghiệm tương đương
Kỹ năng lãnh đạo tốt và có ít nhất 2 năm quản team
Giỏi giao tiếp (văn nói, văn viết và trình bày) và giải quyết vấn đề
Giỏi phân tích (quen thuộc với hệ thống máy móc, và công cụ ở trung tâm phân loại hàng hóa)
Có tư duy cải tiện và có thể kiểm soát sự thay đổi.
Có làm ca.

title: Warehouse Supervisor - Operations, Shopee (location: Bac Ninh)
description:
Giám sát các hoạt động nhập, xuất, tồn của kho nhập hàng nhằm đảm bảo chính xác về số lượng và chất lượng và thời gian yêu cầu của từng quy trình
Quản lý, lên kế hoạch, giám sát nhân sự và đánh giá liên tục quá trình từ nhập, sắp xếp hàng hóa, xuất hàng để đảm bảo công việc đạt hiệu quả
Thực thi công tác kiểm kê chu kỳ, định kỳ và đối chiếu và điều chỉnh dữ liệu tồn kho chênh lệch.
Tính toán và lên kế hoạch về năng lực chứa hàng, nhập hàng
Cải tiến quy trình thủ tục vận hành dựa trên các thực hành tốt nhất
Thực hiện các báo cáo định kỳ: ngày, tuần, tháng và quý.
Thực hiện các công việc phát sinh theo yêu cầu của quản lý trực tiếp.
Tối thiểu 3-5 năm kinh nghiệm làm việc có liên quan.
Chủ động và thích nghi với môi trường phát triển nhanh
Có kinh nghiệm trong lĩnh vực thương mại điện tử sẽ là lợi thế
Khả năng giao tiếp tiếng Anh cơ bản, kỹ năng thuyết trình, kỹ năng phân tích và giải quyết vấn đề

title: Business Intelligence Assistant Manager - Shopee
description:
Define, track, and evaluate core business metrics, and socializing decision-support tools (dashboards, reports, and self-serve analytics).
Partner closely with senior Marketing stakeholders (CRM, Growth, Campaign) to conduct deep-dive analyses and provide actionable insights to support informed decision-making and drive business growth and efficiency.
Lead regular business performance communication to stakeholders, clearly explaining key trends, underlying drivers, and implications to enable strategic and timely decisions across Shopee Vietnam.
Oversee end-to-end business performance across monetization, cost efficiency, and growth opportunities; take ownership of KPI tracking, target setting, and planning for assigned functions.
Support multiple business functions through the development, automation, and ongoing maintenance of management and performance reports.
At least 7 years of experience in Business Intelligence or Data Analytics, including 1-2 years in a team lead or managerial role, with a proven track record of driving measurable business impact in e-commerce, digital user growth, or digital marketing.
Strong analytical thinking, problems solving, able to break complex and ambiguous problems into small and addressable pieces
Experience working with cross-functional teams to gather requirements and define the right metrics to describe the state of the business - both on a macro-level and a micro-level
Ability to learn quickly and adapt with high velocity of change
Strong experience in SQL
Familiarity with Python is a plus

title: Network Strategy & Solution Analyst, Associate - Operations, Shopee
description:
Job summary:
We are looking for a Network Strategy & Solutions - Associate to work on network-level problem solving and solution implementation across Shopee’s large-scale logistics network.
This role focuses on addressing end-to-end and structural network performance issues rather than day-to-day operational problems. You will work on complex, ambiguous topics related to lead time, cost, and capacity, using data and structured thinking to design solutions and help drive them through execution.
This role is ideal for someone who enjoys solving hard problems, connecting the dots across systems, and seeing ideas turn into real impact at scale.
What You Will Do:
Analyze network performance data to identify patterns, issues, and improvement opportunities.
Involve in the design of network-level solutions by breaking down problems into key drivers.
Turning solutions into clear action plans and supporting project implementation.
Work with Operations, Planning, BI, and Tech teams to help deliver initiatives.
Prepare analyses, materials, and updates to support discussions and decision-making.
Must have
Bachelor’s degree in Supply Chain, Business, Engineering, Economics, or related fields.
1–3+ years of experience in consulting, operations, supply chain, analytics, or similar roles.
Strong problem-solving and logical thinking skills, able to break down complex problems and structure clear solutions
Ability to connect the dots across data, operations, and business context
Resilient and proactive, comfortable working in a fast-changing and sometimes ambiguous environment
Open-minded and adaptable, with a strong willingness to challenge existing ways of working and drive change
Strong analytical mindset with experience working with data and KPIs
Good communication skills in both Vietnamese and English
Nice to have
Experience in e-commerce, warehouse operations, or multi-region supply chains
Exposure to supply–demand planning, inventory optimization, or network-related topics
Experience working in cross-functional projects
Strong Excel / SQL / BI skills.

title: North Linehaul Team Leader - Operations, SPX Express
description:
Chịu trách nhiệm chính trong việc đảm bảo hiệu quả hoạt động vận tải hàng ngày (vd: lập kế hoạch và đảm bảo thời gian xe đến/đi đúng giờ, điều tiết giao thông nội/ngoại khu, quản lý nhóm điều phối hiện trường hiệu quả, v.v.)
Thực hiện các báo cáo, phân tích các chỉ số (KPI), hiệu suất hoạt động hàng ngày và đề xuất giải pháp cải thiện vận hành
Lập kế hoạch, lên lịch trình xe tải cho các ngày bình thường và cao điểm. Có sự cân bằng trong việc sử dụng nguồn lực nội bộ (in-house)  và nguồn lực thuê ngoài (vendor) đảm bảo tối ưu về chất lượng và chi phí.
Tìm hiểu và báo cáo nguyên nhân gốc rễ của các sai sót trong vận hành (VD: chậm trễ, va chạm tại nơi làm việc, gian lận, v.v.)
Chủ động cung cấp, chia sẻ những thông tin mang tính thực tế, thực tiễn trong quản lý vận hành và đội ngũ tài xế, giúp các cấp tối ưu hóa hoạt động.
Lập kế hoạch nhân sự và giám sát lịch làm việc của nhân viên điều phối và hỗ trợ hiện trường.
Phối hợp với các bên liên quan để giải quyết các trường hợp khẩn cấp (vd: bổ sung/thay thế gấp xe, xử lý luồng xe khi trạm nhận quá tải, kẹt xe, v.v...).
Làm việc theo ca và đảm bảo có mặt tại hiện trường 70%, giám sát qua hệ thống 30%.
Tốt nghiệp cao đẳng trở lên
Có kinh nghiệm ở vị trí điều phối xe tải hoặc vị trí tương đương ít nhất 2 năm.
Có kinh nghiệm trong việc quản lý đội nhóm (từ 10 người trở lên)
Khả năng tư duy phân tích và kỹ năng xử lý vấn đề: Tốt
Khả năng phối hợp, tương tác với với các bộ phận: Tốt
Có kinh nghiệm giám sát xe tải gps/ công cụ
Có khả năng sử dụng excel/báo cáo và công cụ phân tích dữ liệu
Có khả năng đọc hiểu Tiếng Anh là một lợi thế

title: Senior Market Intelligence Analyst - Shopee
description:
Ensure timely, comprehensive understanding and in-depth Insights (quantitative & qualitative) in market trends, competitors strategies and potential threats of new entries & disruptors/aggressive competition arising from existing competitors
Consolidate, standardize, synthesize & automate sustainable data pipelines from various market data sources (from surveys, crawling, research, 3rd parties…) to create comprehensive, reliable reports/dashboard and analysis for competitors & market landscape
Market Forecast & Planning: Build & maintain and improve financial models to forecast overall market size and trends, competitors specific, including but not limited to Topline (Orders, GMV, Market Share) and Financial Unit efficiency for daily, monthly and annually basis
Monitor competitors’ product/assortments offerings, pricing strategies, marketing campaigns & tactics, revenue policies, operation policies and operational efficiency metrics
Monitor, collect and quantify impacts from across competitors data source into concrete financial model for internal benchmarking
Implement advanced analytics to improve comprehensiveness, reliabilities of competitors intelligence strategies
3+ years of experience in a Business Intelligence or Data Analytics role with proven business impact
Can-do attitude to embrace new changes and challenges in order to solve challenging yet stimulating problems of the business
Strong business judgment, Solid fundamental of structural thinking and problems solving
Experience working with cross-functional teams to gather requirements and define the right metrics to describe the state of the business - both on a macro-level and a micro-level
Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English and Vietnamese
Experience with Financial Modeling would be a big plus
Knowing Programming language (SQL, Python) to manipulate, automate and draw insights from large data
Advanced Excel skills for data analysis and modeling
Previous Experience in Ecommerce/strategy & Planning role is big plus
Familiar with Competitor Intelligence Data platform (data.ai, kalo…) is a big plus

title: Project Management - Digitalisation
description:
Responsibilities
Strategic Project Management: act as the Project Manager to drive assigned business cross-functional projects specifically involving the integration of AI into business operation from feasibility study, requirements collection, project planning to execution as per defined scope and timeline.
Process Architecture & Optimization: act as the Process Improvement Expert to identify inefficiencies and/or inconsistencies in current practices/ As-is process in order to design “To-be” process improvements and automation, from which work with relevant stakeholders to implement process changes
Business Product Liaison: act as the Technology Expert, acting as the critical bridge gap between Business and Product. Lead the translation of complex business needs into digital business requirements and drive the delivery of new system changes in alignment with business needs, including integration with existing systems
Organizational Change Management: act as the Change Management Expert to develop change management strategies and implement changes across the organisation in ensuring smooth transition for impacted employees.
Stakeholder Governance & Communication: Maintain a robust communication framework, providing high-level progress transparency and data-driven updates to the Leadership team and key stakeholders to ensure project alignment and risk mitigation.
Experience in business process modelling and/or business analysis
Strong analytical skills with demonstrated ability to analyse business processes and digital workflows
Logical and structured thinking, with great attention to details
Interpersonal and communication skill, with technical competency
Aptitude for data analysis and great business acumen
Good at problem solving and stakeholder management.
Be opened, flexible and enjoyed fast-paced environment
Good at writing and presentation in both Vietnamese and English
Experience in project management is a Must
Experience in AI Project Management is a Plus
Experience in system implementation/ digital transformation/ process management is a Plus
Knowledge of PMI/ BPMN and/or Lean/Six Sigma is a Plus

title: Process & Performance Executive - Operations, SPX Express
description:
1. Process Design & Standardization
Driving operational excellence across SOC through process standardization, performance analytics, and continuous improvement initiatives. Ensures that SOC operations are efficient, scalable, and alignment with business goals in productivity, quality, and cost.
Analyze existing SOC workflows (Inbound, Sort, Pack, Outbound) to identify process gaps and inefficiencies.
Design, document, and implement standard operating procedures (SOPs) and process improvement frameworks across regions. Lead pilot runs and process validation for new initiatives
Facilitate executive-level and working-level meetings, ensuring structured documentation (e.g., meeting minutes, action logs) and accountability tracking.
2. SOC Performance Management
Define and implement performance frameworks and KPIs / key drivers to monitor input and outcomes, functional improvements post-execution.
Consolidate insights into regular project health dashboards and performance reports for leadership reviews.
3. Project Management Office (PMO)
Drive project excellence by embedding project management standards, tools, and best practices across initiatives.
SOC Capacity & Productivity Optimization: Lead efforts to enhance floor productivity, process standardization, labor efficiency, and automation integration.
Speed & Cost Efficiency: Oversee programs aimed at reducing cost while improving delivery speed, reliability, and customer satisfaction.
4. Coaching & Stakeholder Engagement
Mentor team members and cross-functional stakeholders to build project ownership and problem-solving capabilities.
Act as a thought partner to business and operations teams, providing insight-driven recommendations to shape future project pipelines and investment priorities.
3+ years of experience in supply chain, operations, project management, consulting, or related fields.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with a structured and proactive approach. Advanced Excel skills,
Demonstrated ability to influence stakeholders at various levels and drive alignment across departments without formal authority.
Excellent project management capabilities with experience handling multiple complex projects in fast-paced environments.
Excellent communication skills both written and verbal. Being able to present in English is a plus
Self-starter mindset with high ownership and a bias for action.

title: Sourcing Associate (Facility Management) - SPX Express
description:
Objectives
To assist and provide support on the facilities management to achieve fulfilment speed and maintain the operation sites across nationwide.
Responsibilities
Scope of services: CAPEX investment, renovation/ maintenance of all facilities equipment and related services.
Business Need Analysis: interact with cross-functional stakeholders to challenge and define final Business Requirements (Regulatory, Delivery, Quality, Service and Cost).
Category profiling: Cover annual category spends, history Data Analytics, Supply market analysis and demand forecast to define cost saving opportunities.
Strategic sourcing: Define Sourcing Strategies and in strict compliance with company, applicable laws, and ethical standards. Run local/ overseas sourcing/ RF-x/bid events and others as assigned, within authorized signature limits.
Contract Management: Negotiating, contracting and monitoring contract execution to assure goods are supplied exactly, timely and in good quality.
Supplier management: maintain/ build collaborative relationships with strategic suppliers. Define and build up new suppliers for alternative solutions.
Degree in business administration, facility management, or a related field preferred.
Minimum of 03 years of experience in Procurement, especially in Facility Management categories in the Logistics industry.
Commercial and negotiation skills and ability to understand contracts.
Strong organisational and administrative skills.
Highly motivated with a desire to learn
Attention to detail, the ability to multitask
Good at problem solving and stakeholder management.
Be opened, flexible and enjoyed fast-paced environment

title: Senior Operations Efficiency - Hub Operations, SPX Express (HCMC)
description:
Reporting
Responsible for 100% accuracy in daily/weekly/monthly/yearly operations reports
Support Regional Operation Manager (ROM) by building relevant dashboards, reports, trackers, etc. to control responsible Hub/Region KPI and monitor its achievement
Propose new initiatives to manage performance of responsible hubs and optimize operation activities
Act as a data gate to represent ROM to provide data/input/information for other reports of the company as assigned
Projects
Initiate and help to implement new ideas to develop projects in multiple areas enhancing operational efficiency
Participate in other projects of the company as assigned and play the role of a connector who has a comprehensive understanding of Hub operations
Coordinate with all stakeholders e.g. Operation Excellence, Procurement, Feature, BI… to support their understanding about Hub operation and work with them in specific projects
Follow up feedbacks of the launched projects and adjust plans to best serve actual situations;
Internal control and audit
Develop a deep understanding of SPX in general and their assigned hubs/region in particular and actively identify operational issues for improvement
Do onsite visits and investigate problems arisen to report to ROM for their timely intervention and necessary guidance
Report any anomalies or inconsistencies to ROM upon realization in hub/region operation
Well control SOPs/regulations and be an internal trainer for the hubs/region to understand these SOPs/regulations when assigned
Administrative task
Collaborate with teams in the region and take charge of administrative tasks for the whole region including but not limited to organizing events/parties, ordering stationery, controlling uniform, finalizing payment/receipts and other ad-hoc tasks
Prepare proposals, and presentations as assigned
Other tasks are assigned by the Company from time to time.
3+ years of industry experience with proven business impact
Be able to communicate with different stakeholders
Data analytics (Excel, SQL, etc) and an understanding of logistics operation will be a plus
Have good project ownership, strong analytical thinking, ability to learn quickly and can-do mindset
Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English and Vietnamese
An ability to work within a team and working on own initiative is essential

title: [SPX Express] Senior Associate, Digitalization PMO
description:
Work closely with stakeholders to understand technical information requests, identify gaps in process, and implement digital solutions  to deliver expected business outcomes thereby enhancing the organization’s capacity to achieve strategic goals
Create detailed project plans & business-required documents across various stages, adhering to the project timelines and budget for deliverables
Assist in developing and executing strategies to boost product adoption, engagement, and revenue growth.
Support in planning and execution for impactful product launches
Play a role in coordinating and ensuring smooth releases of new product features.
Assist in user acceptance testing to ensure new features align with specifications.
Help monitor product performance through data analysis, competitor research, and market insights.
Assist in identifying emerging opportunities and challenges for continuous product enhancements.
Contribute to maintaining our products as industry leaders by providing input for improvements.
Hold a Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Logistics, or a related field.
Have at least 2 years of experience in a PMO role and lead the implementation of large-scale projects
Possess good communication skills to effectively collaborate with teams and convey ideas.
Display a keen business sense, data-driven decision-making, and problem-solving skills.
Comfortable with ambiguity, open to feedback, and being able to analyze it for continuous system improvement.

title: Process & Performance, Specialist - Operations, SPX Express
description:
1. Process Design & Standardization
Driving operational excellence across FLM through process standardization, performance analytics, and continuous improvement initiatives. Ensures that FLM operations are efficient, scalable, and alignment with business goals in productivity, quality, and cost.
Analyze existing FLM workflows (Pick up, Sort, Delivery) to identify process gaps and inefficiencies.
Design, document, and implement standard operating procedures (SOPs) and process improvement frameworks across regions. Lead pilot runs and process validation for new initiatives
Facilitate executive-level and working-level meetings, ensuring structured documentation (e.g., meeting minutes, action logs) and accountability tracking.
2. FLM Performance Management
Define and implement performance frameworks and KPIs / key drivers to monitor input and outcomes, functional improvements post-execution.
Consolidate insights into regular project health dashboards and performance reports for leadership reviews.
3. Project Management Office (PMO)
Lead FLM improvement projects end-to-end: define problem statement, baseline, target, workplan, owners, and milestones.
Drive cross-functional execution with Ops, WFM, BI, Product/Tech, and logistics partners (3PL/LM vendors).
Standardize processes and playbooks: peak readiness, backlog clearance, exception handling, escalation ladder.
Run pilots, evaluate outcomes, and scale best practices across stations/regions.
4. Stakeholder & Partner Management
Support governance with internal teams and external partners: performance alignment, action follow-up, and accountability.
Prepare leadership-ready updates: concise narrative, key risks, decisions required, and next actions.
Ensure operational compliance to agreed SOPs and reporting discipline.
3–6 years (or equivalent) experience in operations performance / analytics / project execution in logistics, e-commerce, transportation, or supply chain.
Strong analytical skills: SQL proficiency is preferred; comfortable with BI dashboards and large datasets.

title: Network Excellence Manager - Shopee
description:
As the Manager of Network Excellence, you will lead a high-performing team dedicated to mastering end-to-end lead time management, inventory positioning, and network-level efficiencies.
By bridging data-driven insights with operational execution, you will collaborate with cross-functional leaders to design a seamless, agile, and cost-effective supply chain network that enhances customer experience and supports Shopee & SPX ’s massive growth.
1. Team Leadership & Capability Building
Lead, mentor, and develop a team of specialists and analysts focusing on end-to-end network optimization.
Foster a "Network Thinking" mindset within the team, elevating their capabilities in systems thinking, advanced data analytics, and supply chain modeling.
Set clear KPIs, manage performance, and build a robust talent pipeline within the function.
2. Lead Time & Inventory Balance Optimization
Own the end-to-end lead time performance across the entire fulfillment and delivery network, identifying bottlenecks and driving throughput optimization.
Develop and implement inventory balancing strategies across various network nodes (Warehouses, Sorting Centers, Hubs) to prevent stockouts, minimize overstocks, and reduce transit times.
Optimize network routing and flow allocation to balance capacity and demand, ensuring high agility during peak seasons (Mega Campaigns like 11.11, 12.12).
3. Framework Building & Visibility
Design and establish robust measurement frameworks and visibility tools (dashboards, control towers) to track key drivers impacting network flow and inventory health.
Translate complex network data into actionable business insights, providing senior management with visibility into network constraints and opportunities.
4. Cross-Functional Collaboration & System Improvement
Partner closely with Business Intelligence (BI), Operations, and Demand Planning teams to align operational capabilities with commercial forecasts.
Drive system-level improvement initiatives, collaborating with Regional/Local Product and Tech teams to automate network decision-making tools and enhance WMS/TMS capabilities.
Standardize SOPs for cross-node processes to ensure consistency and scalability.
Bachelor’s Degree or higher in Supply Chain Management, Logistics, Industrial Engineering, Data Analytics, Business Administration, or a related quantitative field.
Minimum 5–7 years of experience in Supply Chain Planning, Network Design, Logistics Optimization, or Management Consulting.
At least 2–3 years of experience in a leadership/people management role.
Strong "Network Thinking" with a deep understanding of end-to-end supply chain dynamics, node-to-node logistics, and inventory theory..
Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills, with the ability to influence cross-functional teams and present complex ideas to senior executives.
Agile and resilient change agent capable of thriving in a fast-paced, ambiguous, and high-pressure environment.
Fluency in English (both written and spoken) is required, as you will interact with regional teams.

Giám sát và quản lý việc chuẩn bị và vận chuyển các đơn đặt hàng. Đảm bảo hiệu quả chi phí, hiệu suất vận hành và năng lực nhân viên tốt nhất.
Giám sát và quản lý việc chuẩn bị và vận chuyển các đơn đặt hàng. Đảm bảo hiệu quả chi phí, hiệu suất vận hành và năng lực nhân viên tốt nhất.

Tham gia vào quá trình tuyển dụng và lựa chọn đúng người cho các trạm được phân công. Hướng dẫn, đào tạo, quản lý và giám sát các thành viên trong nhóm.
Giám sát các báo cáo vận hành (hàng ngày/hàng tuần/hàng tháng, v.v.).
Những công việc khác được Công ty giao tùy từng thời điểm.
Tốt nghiệp Quản trị kinh doanh, Logistics hay các ngành liên quan là lợi thế
Có kinh nghiệm về Logistics là lợi thế
Có thể làm việc theo ca và ko nghỉ cố định
Quản lý đội nhóm tốt và kỹ năng giao tiếp tốt

description:

2. Drive Operational Performance & Initiatives
Oversee the entire parcel sorting process from inbound to outbound, ensuring speed, accuracy, and SLA adherence (Service Level Agreement).
Monitor key performance indicators (KPIs) such as parcel throughput, scan accuracy, processing time, and labor productivity.
Analyze daily operations data to identify process bottlenecks and implement corrective actions.
Roll out and manage initiatives related to process automation, facility layout optimization, and system upgrades in collaboration with central tech and engineering teams.
Forecast volume growth and scale operational capacity accordingly, including peak season and campaign planning
Ensure close coordination with Linehaul, First-mile, and Last-mile teams for smooth end-to-end parcel flow.
3. Leadership & People Management

Drive daily shift planning, workforce scheduling, and headcount forecasting in line with demand fluctuations.
Provide strong coaching and performance feedback to team members to build a high-performance culture.
Foster a collaborative and inclusive working environment that promotes ownership, accountability, and continuous learning.
Partner with HR and Training teams to recruit, onboard, and develop talent pipelines at the sorting center.
Bachelor’s degree in Logistics, Industrial Engineering, Supply Chain Management, or relevant field.
Min 8+ years of hands-on experience in logistics/warehouse/fulfillment center operations, with at least 5 years in a managerial role.
Proven ability to lead large operational teams in a high-pressure, time-sensitive environment.
Familiarity with Sorting Center Operations 5S, Lean, or Six Sigma is a plus.
Good command of Vietnamese and intermediate English (reading/writing/speaking).

title: Engineering & Maintenance Manager – Operations, SPX Express (HCM)
description:
The Engineering & Maintenance Manager is responsible for technical reliability, maintenance excellence, and asset performance across Sorting Centers (SOC), Warehouses (WH), and First Mile (FLM) hubs in the South region.
This role ensures stable operation of ASM and warehouse automation, effective preventive maintenance & CI, disciplined budget control, and strong facility & asset management to support daily operations and peak readiness.
Key Responsibilities:
1. Technical Ownership – Automation, PLC & Facility Systems
Own technical operation of Automated Sorting Machines (ASM) across SOCs
Maintain and troubleshoot PLC-based control systems (logic, I/O, VFDs, HMIs)
Perform basic PLC programming, modification, and debugging to support CI and system stability
Support and maintain warehouse automation systems (conveyors, scanners, sorters, sensors, drives)
Own technical understanding of facility systems, including:
Electrical systems: LV distribution, panels, breakers, grounding, lighting
Network & internet systems: LAN, basic network infrastructure supporting automation & CCTV (coordination with IT)
Water systems: water supply, drainage, pumps, basic plumbing for WH & hub operations
2. Maintenance & Continuous Improvement (CI)
Build and execute preventive & predictive maintenance plans for:
ASM, automation, electrical, network, and water systems
Lead CI initiatives to:
Reduce downtime and recurring failures
Improve MTTR / MTBF
Extend asset lifespan and reliability
Standardize maintenance SOPs, technical checklists, and documentation
3. Budget Planning & Cost Control
Own engineering & maintenance budget for assigned region
Control maintenance cost, spare parts, and service contracts
Support CAPEX planning for automation, electrical upgrades, and facility improvements
Track and report cost savings from CI initiatives
4. Facility & Asset Management
Manage technical infrastructure across SOC, WH, and FLM hubs:
Electrical, automation, network, and water systems
Own asset lifecycle management:
Asset register, condition monitoring, replacement planning
Ensure sites are safe, compliant, and operationally ready
5. Leadership & Stakeholder Management
Lead and develop regional engineering & maintenance teams
Define roles, KPIs, and skill development plans
Coordinate with Ops, IT, Safety, Infrastructure, and vendors
Provide hands-on leadership during incidents and peak operations
6. Compliance & Safety
Ensure compliance with Vietnam regulations and standards, including:
QCVN & TCVN electrical and industrial safety standards
Fire Prevention & Fighting (PCCC) requirements
Support audits, inspections, and corrective actions
Promote safe working practices for electrical, automation, and facility systems
Experience
6–10+ years in engineering, maintenance, or automation roles
Hands-on experience with:
Automated sorting machines / conveyor systems
PLC systems and basic programming
Electrical systems and facility infrastructure
Experience in logistics, warehouse, or industrial environments preferred
Education
:
Bachelor’s degree in Electrical Engineering, Automation, Mechatronics, or related fields
Skills & Mindset
Strong troubleshooting and execution capability
CI-driven and cost-conscious
Able to work in fast-paced, high-pressure operations
Good leadership and cross-functional communication skills
