Market research/ benchmarking analysis to evaluate the feasibility of proposed solutions.
Evaluate business metrics, deliver effective presentations of findings and recommendations, and create a visual display of quantitative information to seek approval from high-level management.
Work with stakeholders to plan & implement, conduct necessary analysis to drive and optimize projects.
Assist team leader in other tasks assigned.
At least 3 years of experience in Project management, operation management, and business consultant is a plus.
Strong problem-solving and storytelling skills, ability to draw insights from data, research, and design practical and scalable solutions.
Strong stakeholder management and good communication skills in English (verbal and written).
Good team player with a positive attitude and a strong sense of integrity and responsibility.
Must be able to work with tight deadlines and able to work with minimal guidance.
Proficient in Excel & PowerPoint.

title: Hub Supervisor (Giám sát Trạm giao nhận) - Hub Operations, SPX Express (Hanoi)
description:
Giám sát và quản lý việc chuẩn bị và vận chuyển các đơn đặt hàng. Đảm bảo hiệu quả chi phí, hiệu suất vận hành và năng lực nhân viên tốt nhất.
Lập kế hoạch và phân công nguồn lực hiệu quả trong ngày campaign và ngày thường.
Đảm bảo đội ngũ giao hàng tuân thủ kỷ luật và giải quyết các tranh chấp/đình công có thể phát sinh trong phạm vi phụ trách. Đảm bảo rằng tất cả hàng hóa bị hư hỏng và các khiếu nại khác đều được xử lý.
Phối hợp với nhiều bên liên quan để giải quyết các vấn đề vận hành nếu có.
Đảm bảo tất cả các trạm đều tuân thủ chính sách an toàn cũng như các quy trình vận hành tiêu chuẩn.
Nhận diện, phân tích, đo lường, đánh giá rủi ro, từ đó tìm ra biện pháp kiểm soát và phòng tránh hậu quả rủi ro trong vận hành.
Tham gia vào quá trình tuyển dụng và lựa chọn đúng người cho các trạm được phân công. Hướng dẫn, đào tạo, quản lý và giám sát các thành viên trong nhóm.
Giám sát các báo cáo vận hành (hàng ngày/hàng tuần/hàng tháng, v.v.).
Tốt nghiệp Quản trị kinh doanh, Logistics hay các ngành liên quan là lợi thế
Có kinh nghiệm về Logistics là lợi thế
Có thể làm việc theo ca và ko nghỉ cố định
Quản lý đội nhóm tốt và kỹ năng giao tiếp tốt
Có khả năng đa nhiệm, quản lý được nhiều Trạm giao nhận và biết sắp xếp ưu tiên
Học nhanh, thích ứng với môi trường có tốc độ nhanh.

title: Senior Demand Planning Associate - Operations, Shopee
description:
We are seeking a high-performing individual to support Fulfillment by Shopee (FBS) inventory strategy, by managing demand planning in sync with overall campaign activities, inventory allocation, and fulfillment performance. This role helps ensure stocks are available, orders are fulfilled efficiently, and sellers and buyers have a smooth experience.
The Demand Planning role works closely with internal teams and sellers to forecast demand, plan inventory, and improve fulfillment across Shopee warehouses.
Key responsibilities:
Support demand forecasting, inventory planning, and fulfillment operations for Fulfillment by Shopee (FBS), aligned with campaign and business activities.
Monitor inventory health, stock availability, and fulfillment performance across warehouses.
Partner with Supply Planning and Operations teams to support inventory allocation and replenishment planning.
Analyze demand, inventory, and fulfillment data to identify risks, opportunities, and actionable insights.
Support improvement initiatives for demand planning processes, forecasting accuracy, and fulfillment efficiency.
Collaborate with Data Science, Business Intelligence, and Operations teams to support forecasting model enhancements and operational improvements.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with attention to detail.
Good communication and stakeholder management skills.
Ability to work effectively in a fast-paced and data-driven environment.
Experience working with complex data sets.
Experience in e-commerce, marketplace, retail, supply chain, or operations-related roles.
Knowledge of demand planning, inventory management, or forecasting concepts.
Knowledge of statistics or other analytical techniques.
Familiarity with marketplace, e-commerce, or retail business models.

title: Senior Seller Quality & Compliance - Operations, Shopee
description:
Oversee seller compliance across Mall Onboard/Offboard, PS On/Offboard and Seller Penalty Control to ensure sellers meet platform standards and legal requirements.
Build and improve control processes based on policy, seller type and business risk.
Review seller performance through data metrics, operational behaviors and supporting documents such as licenses, contracts and brand authorization.
Handle seller complaints and appeals with fairness and transparency.
Collaborate closely with BD, Legal, and cross-functional teams to align compliance and brand protection practices.
Lead module PICs in task delivery, SLA, quality and productivity.
Manage task efficiency, including workload, backlog, backup and bottlenecks.
Own process/SOP implementation for key initiatives.
Consolidate feature requests, UAT feedback, issue tracking and post-launch reviews.
Escalate key risks and propose data-backed improvements.
3+ years of experience in e-commerce, logistics or compliance operations.
Strong analytical and data skills, proficient in Excel/Google Sheets dashboards.
Experience in seller verification, brand/IP control, or compliance operations
Excellent communication and stakeholder management abilities.
Leadership experience in managing BPO or in-house teams.

title: Claim & Compensation - SPX Express
description:
Responsible for reviewing cases related to shipments and lost/damaged goods.
Collaborate with operations to motivate them to manage inventory effectively to prevent overdue orders per SLA.
Conduct investigations on lost goods to determine reasons for stock holding at a station or exceeding loss thresholds.
Review the entire order list to identify process errors and initiate appropriate loss compensation.
Make sound recommendations based on investigation findings.
Communicate effectively across functions.
Ensure compliance with all relevant standards, working practices, guidelines, and KPIs.
Perform any other similar or related tasks as required or directed.
With at least a year of experience handling claims, preferably with a background in the E-Commerce industry.
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, both verbal and written.
Analytical with effective negotiation and problem-solving skills.
Able to develop solutions and communicate effectively across the organization.
Capable of clearly identifying and defining issues raised via emails and making necessary recommendations.
Strong teamwork skills, a positive attitude, and a willingness to learn.
Driven, motivated, and proactive.
Personality traits: trustworthy, careful, and proactive.

title: Network solution design,  SPX Express
description:
1. Network Strategy & Station Management
Develop a deep, comprehensive understanding of SPX's entire logistics network structure, including physical Hubs, Mobile Hubs, Non-Physical Hubs, and other critical network nodes.
Analyze the critical relationship between network infrastructure and end-to-end operational performance across the parcel journey.
Actively monitor network configurations and champion initiatives that drive effectiveness, flow efficiency, and long-term scalability.
2. Capacity Planning & Coverage Optimization
Monitor and analyze hub capacity, throughput, and utilization trends across the entire logistics network.
Evaluate and refine hub coverage models to guarantee optimal performance and identify potential network bottlenecks.
Drive network expansion, coverage redesign, and capacity optimization projects.
Run scenario simulations and translate complex data into actionable recommendations for high-level network planning decisions.
3. Operations Immersion & Cross-Functional Collaboration
Step out of the spreadsheets and into the field! Conduct regular site visits to understand the daily operational challenges faced by our on-the-ground teams.
Act as the vital bridge between Planning and Operations, translating real-world field insights into accurate network planning assumptions and logic.
Validate planning models against actual operational constraints and opportunities to vastly improve decision-making quality.
4. Strategic Project Leadership
Support and lead strategic projects focused on infrastructure readiness, holistic network optimization, and operational excellence.
Prepare compelling analyses, presentations, and strategic recommendations for key stakeholders and leadership teams.
Logistics Expert: You have a strong background in Supply Chain, Logistics, Industrial Engineering, or Network Planning.
Analytical Thinker: You are highly proficient in data analysis, scenario modeling, and capacity planning.
Operations Advocate: You possess deep operational empathy; you understand that the best plans are built on actual field realities, not just theory.
Strategic Communicator: You excel at translating complex data into clear, actionable presentations for cross-functional stakeholders.
Problem Solver: You are naturally curious, proactive in identifying bottlenecks, and relentless in pursuing operational excellence.

title: Business Development Supervisor - Business Development, ShopeeFood (Location: Ha Noi)
description:
Responsible for customer development in the assigned area for ShopeeFood products and services.
Analyze data to plan and strategize for the team in the short and long term.
Lead the team to plan and strategize to achieve the targeted  goals.
Coordinate with other departments to ensure the operation of products.
Responsible for managing, recruiting, training the business development team.
Regularly and business development staff visit the shops in the area, understand the actual situation.
Prepare reports on work results at the request of superiors.
Perform other tasks as required.
University degree or above majoring in: Business Administration, Marketing, …
At least 03 years of experience in Sales, experience specializing in connecting with restaurant chains/brands in the F&B market.
Preference will be given to candidates with experience in business development in the field of E-commerce, E-wallet.
Able to withstand high pressure.
Agility, adaptability and good teamwork.
Good management, negotiation and presentation skills.
High sense of responsibility at work.
Proficient in using Microsoft office applications (Word, Excel, Power Point).
Search, process, analyze information and make decisions.
Planning and managing change. Task management and time management.

title: Transport Coordinator (Điều phối vận tải) - Linehaul, SPX Express (HCM/Bình Dương/Nghệ An)
description:
Đóng vai trò là cầu nối giữa bộ phận Vận tải và các bên liên quan (SOC/HUB) tại khu vực làm việc
Làm việc với đội ngũ tài xế in-house và các nhà cung cấp để đảm bảo số lượng xe tải cho vận hành, xác định nguyên nhân các vấn đề phát sinh trong lúc vận hành có sự điều chỉnh kịp thời
Giám sát nhóm hỗ trợ điều phối để đảm bảo lưu lượng giao thông và tối ưu năng suất nhập hàng/xuất hàng tại kho
Đảm bảo tài xế tuân thủ quy trình, quy định của kho và khu công nghiệp (ví dụ: sử dụng chất có cồn, chất kích thích, chất cấm, trang phục, giấy tờ xe,...)
Tìm hiểu và báo cáo nguyên nhân gốc rễ của các sai sót trong vận hành (VD: chậm trễ, va chạm tại nơi làm việc, gian lận, v.v.)
Phối hợp với các bên liên quan để giải quyết các trường hợp khẩn cấp (VD: bổ sung/thay thế gấp xe tải, quá tải, kẹt xe, v.v.)
Làm các báo cáo định kỳ và theo dõi hiệu suất hoạt động hàng ngày
Làm việc theo ca và luôn có mặt tại hiện trường trong suốt quá trình làm việc.
Tốt nghiệp trung học phổ thông trở lên & có ít nhất 1 năm kinh nghiệm ở vị trí điều phối trực tiếp hoặc vận hành tại SOC, FLM, WH. Hoặc tốt nghiệp Cao đẳng/ Đại học đúng chuyên ngành Logistics
Có tư duy phân tích và kỹ năng xử lý vấn đề tốt
Có khả năng phối hợp nhịp nhàng, thiện chí với các bộ phận
Ưu tiên có kinh nghiệm giám sát xe tải GPS/công cụ
Có khả năng sử dụng excel/báo cáo và công cụ phân tích dữ liệu
Có khả năng đọc hiểu Tiếng Anh là một lợi thế.

title: Transportation Supervisor (Giám sát vận tải) - Operations, SPX Express (HCM/Binh Duong)
description:
Chịu trách nhiệm tối ưu hóa chi phí và cải thiện chất lượng dịch vụ của khu vực phụ trách
Lên kế hoạch hàng năm cho cấp khu vực để đảm bảo hoạt động tối ưu với chi phí và SLA tốt nhất
Đề xuất và theo dõi các dự án để cải thiện hoạt động Linehaul
Xem xét và giám sát kế hoạch book xe trong những ngày BAU/Spike-day
Phối hợp với các bộ phận chức năng khác, giải quyết các trường hợp khẩn cấp (VD: yêu cầu khẩn cấp về xe tải bổ sung/thay thế, trạm quá tải, giao thông đông đúc, v.v.)
Đảm bảo cải tiến liên tục hiệu suất (KPI) và hiệu quả hoạt động thông qua việc tối ưu các quy trình làm việc (SOP)
Điều tra và hiểu rõ nguyên nhân gốc rễ của các lỗi trong hoạt động (VD: vi phạm thời gian làm việc, tài xế đánh nhau, gian lận, v.v.)
Xây dựng mối quan hệ tốt với các các bên liên quan như SOC, FLM, Vendor
Đảm bảo tài xế tuân thủ các quy định/SOP nội bộ và bên ngoài
Tích cực đóng góp và cung cấp những hiểu biết sâu sắc, chi tiết từ thực tế (vận hành, tài xế, v.v.) để tối ưu hóa hoạt động vận hành.
Cao đẳng, cử nhân hoặc tương đương; Bằng cấp về hậu cần, chuỗi cung ứng, vận tải, quản lý trang thiết bị sẽ là một lợi thế
Kinh nghiệm tối thiểu 3 năm quản lý vận chuyển
Tư duy phân tích và kỹ năng giải quyết vấn đề tốt
Quản lý nhiệm vụ và cộng tác nhóm tốt
Có kinh nghiệm trong giám sát xe tải GPS/Công cụ
Excel/Công cụ báo cáo và phân tích tốt
Kỹ năng đọc tiếng Anh tốt
Có kinh nghiệm quản lý nhóm
Kinh nghiệm trong Thiết kế/Tối ưu hóa SOP là một điểm cộng lớn
Có khả năng xoay ca và làm việc theo ca.

title: Nhân viên phát triển kinh doanh - SMB Acquisition, ShopeeFood (Location: Quang Ngai, Hue)
description:
Tìm kiếm, phát triển mạng lưới khách hàng tiềm năng ( có thể là trực tiếp hoặc gián tiếp )
Thực hiện kế hoạch tư vấn, kí hợp đồng với khách hàng chưa hợp tác trên nền tảng ShopeeFood
Tiếp cận, tư vấn, kí hợp đồng, hỗ trợ phương cách sử dụng các tính năng sản phẩm với nhóm khách hàng được chỉ định.
Xây dựng và kiểm soát tốt quan hệ khách hàng.
Hỗ trợ triển khai chiến dịch quảng cáo bằng POSM tại các điểm bán hàng chỉ định.
Hỗ trợ giải quyết các vấn đề liên quan tới khách hàng.
Làm việc với các bộ phận liên quan để đề xuất những yêu cầu phù hợp của khách hàng, nâng cao trải nghiệm bán hàng.
Tốt nghiệp Đại học/Cao Đẳng chuyên ngành Quản Trị Kinh Doanh hoặc liên quan.
Có kinh nghiệm trong lĩnh vực F&B hoặc Thương Mại Điện Tử, E-wallet, POS,...
Kĩ năng giao tiếp và đàm phán
Kiểm soát tốt thời gian công việc và có khả năng làm việc với các khách hàng khó tính/ cửa hàng bán lẻ
Thích nghi nhanh với qui trình và thích ứng với việc theo dõi công việc của chính mình một cách có hệ thống và chính xác.
Chăm chỉ, Trung thực, Có trách nhiệm, Năng động, Tự tin

title: Shopee Ads Project Management - Business Development, Shopee
description:
Product Monitoring & Issue Management
Own specific ad products and features; develop in-depth knowledge of mechanics, user benefits, and business impact.
Monitor seller usage, performance metrics, and operational health; escalate and track bugs and system issues with technical teams to ensure timely resolution.
Conduct analysis on market, competitor intelligence, seller survey, and performance data to generate insights and recommend product improvements.
New Product & Feature Launches
Design and execute end-to-end go-to-market plans, including stakeholder alignment, testing coordination with technical teams, and communication plans for business teams and sellers.
Monitor post-launch impact and surface optimization opportunities to continuously improve product performance.
Seller & Business Enablement
Partner with seller experience and business teams to address seller product inquiries and refine usage guidelines.
Deliver product briefing and training to seller and business teams.
Bachelor's degree in Business, Economics, Marketing, Data Analytics, or related fields.
3+ years of experience in Product Operations, Strategy & Planning, Project Management, e-Commerce, or Digital Marketing.
Solid understanding of digital advertising products.
Strong project and stakeholder management skills; excellent written and verbal communication.
Data-driven and results-oriented; strong critical thinking and problem-solving ability.
Able to manage multiple deadlines in a fast-paced environment
Proficient in Microsoft Office (Excel, PowerPoint, Word).
Prior experience in e-commerce, digital advertising, or seller-facing roles.
Familiarity with product analytics tools or BI dashboards.

title: Chuyên viên đối ngoại, SPX Express
description:
Chịu trách nhiệm làm việc với các cơ quan nhà nước (Công An, UBND, Quản lý thị trường, các Sở Ban Ngành,…) khi có yêu cầu phối hợp kiểm tra phương tiện giao hàng và hoạt động tại các kho/bưu cục của Công ty.
Phụ trách liên hệ, trao đổi và giải thích thông tin; ký kết các văn bản, giấy tờ theo yêu cầu của cơ quan Chính phủ liên quan đến vận chuyển hàng hóa bằng phương tiện giao thông hoặc lưu trữ hàng hóa trong kho /bưu cục
Phối hợp làm việc với cơ quan công an điều tra các cấp, thu thập/cung cấp thông tin, chứng cứ để xử lý các trường hợp gian lận, vi phạm pháp luật (nếu có)
Phối hợp với các bộ phận liên quan trong hệ thống như khối Vận hành, bộ phận Pháp chế, Tài chính - Kế toán, Nhân sự để giải quyết các khiếu nại, khiếu kiện (nếu có)
Phối hợp làm việc với cơ quan Cảnh sát phòng cháy và chữa cháy tại địa phương về việc việc chấp hành các quy định về phòng cháy và chữa cháy tại các kho/bưu cục.
Một số việc khác theo sự phân công của quản lý.
Bằng cử nhân, ưu tiên các chuyên ngành Luật và các lĩnh vực liên quan
Có kinh nghiệm làm việc với các cơ quan nhà nước (tối thiểu 1 năm) hoặc làm trong môi trường các cơ quan nhà nước (tối thiểu 2 năm)
Hiểu biết về các vấn đề chính phủ/quan hệ đối ngoại, làm việc hiệu quả với nhiều bên liên quan.
Kỹ năng giao tiếp tốt.
Tinh thần sẵn sàng học hỏi và sẵn sàng di chuyển khi được yêu cầu

title: Demand & Inventory Planning Executive
description:
The Operations Planning Associate supports end-to-end operational planning across Shopee’s warehouse network by coordinating sales forecasts with execution requirements. The role contributes to operational readiness, ensures efficient resource planning, and strengthens alignment between Commercial and Operations teams, especially during campaign and peak periods.
1. Demand & Performance Planning:
Consolidate sales projections from Commercial teams and support the development of warehouse-level operational plans.
Translate sales forecasts into basic outbound plans and daily operational metrics under guidance from senior team members.
Monitor performance against plans, highlight gaps, and support adjustment actions to maintain operational efficiency.
Assist in improving forecast accuracy through data review and cross-team coordination.
Support the enhancement of planning frameworks to improve long-term alignment between Commercial and Operations teams.
2. Ops Continuity Planning:
Assist in planning for peak periods such as campaigns and holidays, including collecting volume projections and preparing capacity inputs.
Coordinate with Opex, Workforce, and Warehouse teams to align operational requirements and pre-campaign KPIs.
Act as a supporting point of contact between Commercial and Warehouse teams for activities that impact order load (flash sales, livestreams, campaigns).
Track execution performance during campaign periods and escalate risks as needed.
Support contingency planning and issue follow-up to ensure operational continuity during high volume periods.
3. Executive Reporting & Process Improvement:
Prepare and update dashboards or reports to track operational health, forecast accuracy, and campaign results.
Perform data validation and assist in translating findings into insights for operational improvement.
Identify basic process gaps and support initiatives to enhance planning visibility and accuracy across the warehouse network.
Execute other tasks or projects assigned by the line manager to support planning and operational objectives.
Bachelor’s degree in Industrial Engineering, Supply Chain, Operations Management, or a related field.
1–3 years of experience in warehouse operations, production planning, supply chain, or related roles.
Understanding of capacity planning, throughput concepts, and operational workflows is preferred.
Proficient in Excel; experience with Power BI or SQL is a plus.
Strong communication and coordination skills.
High ownership, attention to detail, and ability to work effectively in a fast-paced environment

title: Senior FBS Key Account Management (B2B & SME) - Business Development, Shopee (HN/HCM)
description:
Lead the end-to-end business development cycle — identifying market opportunities, engaging C-level executives and Brand Managers at international corporations, and delivering tailored FBS solutions that address their supply chain and commercial objectives.
Navigate complex commercial negotiations covering pricing structures, contractual terms, and SLA. commitments — driving agreements that are commercially sound and mutually beneficial.
Serve as the central coordinator across Operations, Tech, and Legal teams to deliver a seamless and on-time onboarding experience for corporate accounts — resolving blockers proactively before they impact the seller relationship.
Maintain deep market and platform knowledge to provide consultative, insight-led support to clients. Collaborate closely with accounts to co-develop commercial plans and consistently deliver against monthly and annual targets.
Other tasks as assigned.
3 – 5 years of solid experience in Business Development, Corp/B2B Sales, or Key Account Management.
Exceptional communicator with strong storytelling and executive presentation skills — confident leading high-stakes meetings, pitching to C-level stakeholders, and representing FBS in both in-person and remote settings.
Sharp analytical and strategic thinking skills — able to synthesise market data, identify commercial opportunities, and translate insights into actionable business plans that drive measurable outcomes.
Professional fluency in English — written and spoken — is essential for engaging and negotiating with regional and global brand teams.

title: Partner Acquisition Associate - SPX Express
description:
Responsible for end-to-end partner acquisition and onboarding activities to achieve assigned business targets
Lead and manage acquisition workforce activities to ensure a healthy acquisition pipeline, partner conversion, and onboarding performance
Train and coach acquisition team members to improve partner engagement quality, communication effectiveness, and team performance
Prepare and deliver reports for acquisition productivity and efficiency
Monitor and analyze performance to identify gaps, propose solutions for optimization, and drive continuous improvement
Coordinate closely with cross-functional teams to ensure smooth execution, partner onboarding, and target achievement
Other tasks are assigned by the Company from time to time
Bachelor’s degree or above in Business Administration, Economics, Supply Chain, Logistics, or related fields
At least 2 years of experience in partner management, key account management, customer success, or commercial operations within logistics, e-commerce, or similar industries
Good understanding of sales funnel management and performance tracking
Detail-oriented with solid analytical and problem-solving capabilities
Comfortable working with data, performance metrics, and operational dashboards
Proactive, execution-driven, and able to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment
Strong communication, coordination, negotiation, and stakeholder management skills

title: Commercial Insights Associate - SPX Express
description:
Build and maintain dashboards to track key growth metrics across acquisition, conversion, and retention funnels
Monitor and analyze performance on a regular basis, identifying gaps, trends, and actionable insights
Support target setting and phasing, ensuring alignment with overall business goals
Prepare structured management reports with clear narratives and data-backed recommendations
Manage and track budget utilization, ensuring efficiency and alignment with growth priorities
Coordinate with cross-functional teams to consolidate inputs, align on performance expectations, and drive follow-ups
1+ years of experience in E-commerce, Program Management, Strategy, Consulting, or Tech
Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills
Strong numerical acumen with the ability to interpret data and derive insights
Ability to work in a fast-paced, data-driven environment
Strong communication and collaboration skills
Proficiency in data visualization and executive reporting
Experience in project management and coordination is a plus

title: Trưởng Nhóm Kho (Warehouse Team Lead) - Operations, Shopee (Long An)
description:
Kiểm tra, đóng gói và bàn giao cho bên vận chuyển
Theo dõi hàng tồn kho, và sắp xếp hàng hoá trong kho
Hướng dẫn các hoạt động công việc trong kho cho đội nhóm
Quản lý nhân sự trong ca
Báo cáo hằng ngày theo yêu cầu
Đảm bảo tiêu chuẩn kho.
Hiểu biết về kho, có kinh nghiêm ở vị trí tương đương là lợi thế
Hiểu biết về hàng hoá
Nhanh nhẹn và có khả năng làm việc độc lập cũng như trong đội nhóm
Có khả năng làm việc theo ca

title: Trưởng Nhóm Kho Phân Loại (SOC Team Lead) - SOC, SPX Express (Binh Duong)
description:
Hỗ trợ giám sát hàng hóa và các hoạt động của kho nhằm đảm bảo thời gian xuất và nhập hàng hóa.
Giám sát xuất, nhập, tồn của hàng hóa chính xác về số lượng, loại hàng, hình, …
Thực thi công tác kiểm kê theo định kỳ, đối chiếu và điều chỉnh dữ liệu tồn kho.
Chịu trách nhiệm hướng dẫn, đào tạo và quản lý đội ngũ lao động chính thức và thời vụ.
Thực hiện các báo cáo định kỳ: ngày, tuần, tháng và quý.
Thực hiện các công việc phát sinh theo yêu cầu của quản lý trực tiếp.
Tốt nghiệp từ THPT trở lên
Tối thiểu 2 năm kinh nghiêm ở vị trí tương đương là lợi thế
Có kinh nghiệm về quản lý đội nhóm
Hiểu biết về vận hành kho phân loại
Nhanh nhẹn và có khả năng làm việc độc lập
Kinh nghiệm về việc quản lý, xử lý và phân tích số liệu
Có khả năng làm việc theo ca

title: Nhân viên Kỹ thuật và Bảo trì, SPX Express (Bình Dương)
description:
1.Thực hiện sửa chữa máy móc, thiết bị
Thực hiện việc sửa chữa máy móc, thiết bị, tài sản, cơ sở vật chất của Công ty
Đánh giá và đề xuất phương án sửa chữa gồm tự sửa chữa hoặc thuê dịch vụ ngoài
Thực hiện sửa chữa hoặc kiểm tra giám sát quá trình sửa chữa
Giải quyết kịp thời các khiếu nại về sự cố sửa chữa. Đảm bảo máy móc hoạt động ổn định để hoạt động vận hành không bị gián đoạn
Cập nhật và lưu trữ các hồ sơ có liên quan (Phiếu sửa chữa, biên bản nghiệm thu,...)
2. Thực hiện bảo trì
Thực hiện bảo trì định kỳ máy móc, thiết bị theo hướng dẫn vận hành
Nghiệm thu bảo trì và lưu trữ các hồ sơ có liên quan
3. Thực hiện kiểm tra giám sát, nghiệm thu việc lắp đặt tài sản cố định, máy móc
Nhận thông tin lắp đặt từ các bộ phận liên quan.
Thực hiện hoặc kiểm tra giám sát và nghiệm thu quá trình lắp đặt.
Bàn giao cho bộ phận sử dụng (ký vào biên bản nghiệm thu).
4. Thực hiện công tác an toàn, vệ sinh công nghiệp, PCCC, 5S trong khu vực làm việc.
5. Thực hiện các công việc khác theo sự điều động của Quản lý
Tốt nghiệp Trung cấp nghề trở lên ngành cơ khí sửa chữa, cơ điện, tự động hóa, điện công nghiệp, bảo dưỡng công nghiệp.
Đã có kinh nghiệm làm việc bảo trì máy móc thiết bị trong các đơn vị, nhà máy sản xuất.
Có khả năng đọc hiểu các bản vẽ điện cơ bản, sử dụng tốt phần mềm AutoCAD (2D, 3D), PLC, HMI
Có khả năng nhận định và dự báo các sự cố trong hoạt động vận hành máy móc
Hiểu rõ các quy trình vận hành, thao tác, quy trình an toàn, xử lý sự cố máy móc
Làm việc theo ca, 6 ngày/ tuần, có làm ca đêm.
Nhanh nhẹn, nhiệt tình, hòa đồng và có trách nhiệm cao trong công việc, luôn cố gắng tự học hỏi & phấn đấu đạt yêu cầu của công ty đặt ra

title: Business Intelligence Analyst, SPX Express
description:
Data Analytics:
Develop, manage business intelligence solutions and provide data reports to improve business operation and processes
Evaluate and define business metrics, democrats data by building and socialising decision tools (dashboard, reports)
Prepare business cases or calculations for key initiatives
Support various business functions with the development and maintenance of various management reports
Stakeholder Management:
Collaborate with stakeholders for the purpose of collecting data and execute company’s mission
Identify the development needs of data analytics and reporting for stakeholders for the purpose of improving operations of the organization for efficiency and profitability
Consult business stakeholders (e.g. Business Development, Operation Excellence, etc.) to run analysis that lead to actionable Insights to growth the business
Lead the effort to communicate state of the business to stakeholders regularly with the purpose of enabling SPX Express team understand reasons behind the trends and provide insight to drive strategic decisions
Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, Economics and other related courses
3-4 years of industry experience in Business Intelligence or Data Analytics role with proven business impact
Experience in mySQL is compulsory
Experience working with cross-functional teams to gather requirements and define the right metrics to describe the state of the business - both on a macro-level and a micro-level
Passion for creating highly usable and thorough dashboards/visualizations
Strong analytical thinking and ability to learn quickly with can do attitude
Knowing statistical programming language (Python, R) to manipulate and draw insights from large data set is a plus
Excellence written and verbal communication skills in English and Vietnamese to coordinate with stakeholders from across the region

title: Supply Planner
description:
The E-commerce Supply Planner plays a critical role in ensuring optimal inventory availability for an e-commerce business managing thousands of SKUs. This position focuses on developing and executing replenishment strategies by leveraging large datasets, historical trends, and sales forecasts. The role requires meticulous attention to detail, strong logical thinking, and advanced data processing skills to maintain balanced stock levels and drive operational efficiency.
1. Replenishment Strategy & Execution:
Develop and implement replenishment strategies using sales forecasts, historical data, and demand patterns.
Create and maintain advanced planning tools to ensure accurate and scalable replenishment processes.
Generate and manage purchase requisitions, resolving discrepancies in pricing, quantities, and delivery timelines.
Collaborate with suppliers to streamline purchase confirmation and ensure timely stock replenishment.
Monitor replenishment accuracy and proactively address gaps to minimize stockouts and overstocking.
2. Inventory management
Analyze large-scale inventory data to provide actionable insights for stock optimization.
Coordinate stock transfers between warehouses to maintain balanced inventory levels across multiple locations.
Work closely with the Warehouse team to ensure accurate and timely physical stock movements.
Identify slow-moving or excess inventory and recommend corrective actions. Supplier & Cross-Functional
3. Collaboration:
Act as the primary point to support replenishment goals.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams (e.g., Marketing, Business Development, Ops KAM…) to optimize supply chain performance.
Detect and resolve supplier-related issues efficiently to ensure seamless operations and customer satisfaction.
Support ad-hoc projects and requests from the team lead to enhance replenishment processes.
Bachelor’s degree in Supply Chain Management, Economics, Business or a related field.
Minimum of 1-2 years of experience in replenishment planning, supply planning strategy, or inventory optimization, ideally in e-commerce, retail, or manufacturing.
Advanced proficiency in data analysis and processing tools such as VBA, Power Query,
Python, or similar (required for handling large datasets) is preferred.
Proven ability to manage and analyze large volumes of data (experience with 20,000+ SKUs is a plus).
Exceptional attention to detail and strong logical reasoning skills.
Excellent communication skills, including strong English listening and speaking abilities, to effectively collaborate with regional teams and stakeholders.
Fluency in written and spoken English, with experience presenting data-driven replenishment insights
Proficiency in MS Office (Excel), Google Sheets
Proactive mindset with a focus on continuous improvement and adaptability to a fast-paced e-commerce environment.
Strong stakeholder management and problem-solving skills.

title: (Senior) Affiliate Partnership - Marketing, Shopee
description:
MCN Key Account Management will manage and grow relationships with MCN partners and KOLs under network, driving affiliate content performance, and platform growth in the Vietnam market. The role emphasizes strategic collaboration, data-driven insights, and alignment with platform objectives.
Partner Management
Manage a portfolio of assigned MCN partners, fostering professional and effective collaboration.
Work with MCN partners to enhance KOL quality and performance under network.
Formulate short-term and long-term operational and growth plans for MCN partners.
Drive MCN adoption of strategic initiatives/programs which are aligned with platform growth objectives, manage end-to-end execution to ensure effectiveness.
Negotiate contracts, incentive structures, and collaboration terms for mutually beneficial partnerships.
Cross-Functional Collaboration
Collaborate with business development, campaign, operations, product teams… to drive MCN efforts with broader platform goals.
Work with other functional teams to drive optimization of platform governance, strategy, data, and product development.
Reporting and Analysis
Analyze MCN performance to provide actionable recommendations, identify growth opportunities, and develop operational strategies.
Deliver data-driven insights to enhance overall MCN performance and align with platform strategic objectives.
Bachelor’s degree or above.
2+ years in e-commerce and partnership management.
High integrity, critical thinking, good pressure resistance, and strong learning ability.
Excellent communication and stakeholder management, fluent in English and Vietnamese.
Detail-oriented and able to manage multiple projects.
Good business sensitivity with independent thinking.
Familiarity with affiliate marketing, influencer marketing and social media.

title: Business Development Supervisor, Shopee Food
description:
Responsible for customer development in the assigned area for ShopeeFood products and services.
Analyze data to plan and strategize for the team in the short and long term.
Lead the team to plan and strategize to achieve the targeted  goals.
Coordinate with other departments to ensure the operation of products.
Responsible for managing, recruiting, training the business development team.
Regularly and business development staff visit the shops in the area, understand the actual situation.
Prepare reports on work results at the request of superiors.
Perform other tasks as required.
University degree or above majoring in: Business Administration, Marketing, …
At least 03 years of experience in Sales, experience specializing in connecting with restaurant chains/brands in the F&B market.
Preference will be given to candidates with experience in business development in the field of E-commerce, E-wallet.
Able to withstand high pressure.
Agility, adaptability and good teamwork.
Good management, negotiation and presentation skills.
High sense of responsibility at work.
Proficient in using Microsoft office applications (Word, Excel, Power Point).
Search, process, analyze information and make decisions.
Planning and managing change. Task management and time management.

title: Brand Management - Business Development, Shopee
description:
Ensure the success of key brands on Shopee platform including driving Revenue and smooth operation.
Educate brands on Shopee features, Shopee promotional campaign and market insights.
Implement campaigns for brands, analyse and report their performance.
Develop and execute strategies to drive brand performance, ensuring alignment with GMV and operational targets.
Track and review brand performance metrics frequently, providing data-driven insights and recommendations.
Collaborate with multifunctional teams, including inventory planning, commercial, and marketing, to align on strategies.
Coordinate on-site and off-site strategies to maximize brand visibility and conversion.
Address questions and resolve issues raised by brands or internal teams promptly, ensuring win-win solutions.
Work with brands to plan long-term growth strategies, including category expansion and new product launches.
Other tasks as assigned.
Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Marketing, or a related field.
At least 1 years of proven experience in Key Account, Merchandiser, Business Development at recognizable brands or retailers.
Familiarity with e-commerce operations and platforms is a plus.
Strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret performance metrics and provide actionable insights.
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills for building relationships with stakeholders.
Highly proficient in English, both written and verbal.
Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment and deliver results under tight deadlines.
Proactive problem-solving mindset with a focus on identifying and addressing challenges.

title: Community Engagement Associate (Event)  - Marketing, Shopee
description:
1. Funnel Performance Planning & Vendor Alignment
Translate New Buyer & KOC funnel goals (acquisition, activation, retention) into clear event strategies and execution plans.
Align KPIs, deliverables, and success metrics with vendors to ensure outcomes are met across all funnel stages.
Leverage data insights to guide vendors on target audience approach, engagement methods, and conversion tactics during events.
2. Event Planning & Vendor Execution Management
Own end-to-end planning of offline events, including concept development, event flow, and execution roadmap.
Develop structured plans covering logistics, timelines, licensing/permissions, and on-ground operations.
Manage vendors closely to ensure high-quality execution, consistent messaging, and smooth coordination across all touchpoints.
Act as the main point of contact to troubleshoot issues and ensure delivery aligns with agreed plans and KPIs.
3. Journey Experience & On-ground Optimization
Design effective on-site and pre/post-event engagement flows to maximize KOC acquisition and activation.
Identify friction points in user experience during events and work with vendors to continuously optimize engagement mechanics.
Evaluate vendor performance and event effectiveness, driving improvements and standardizing best practices for future scalability.
4. Online Community Management & Engagement
Develop and execute engagement initiatives to attract, activate, and retain Buyer & KOCs across online communities.
Manage community operations, including content planning, member engagement, and issue resolution.
Monitor community performance and optimize engagement strategies to improve member experience and retention.
Gather community insights and feedback to support event planning, funnel optimization, and program improvements.
2-3 years of experience in Event Planning, Project Management, or Vendor Management, with a focus on offline execution.
Proven track record in managing vendors/agencies and delivering projects end-to-end.
Strong project management skills, including planning, timeline control, stakeholder coordination, and on-ground issue handling.
Experience working cross-functionally with internal teams (e.g., Marketing, Operations, Product).
Strong communication skills in both English and Vietnamese, especially in vendor management and stakeholder alignment.
High ownership mindset, proactive attitude, and ability to work under pressure in fast-paced environments.
Detail-oriented with strong execution capabilities.
Good proficiency in Microsoft Excel, Google Sheets, and Google Slides for planning, tracking, and reporting.
Experience in KOL/KOC, Affiliate Marketing, or e-commerce ecosystems.
Experience in organizing large-scale offline events (e.g., campus activations, roadshows, industrial zone activations).
Basic analytical skills, with the ability to understand funnel performance and optimize event outcomes.
Exposure to acquisition campaigns or growth-related projects.
Familiarity with incentive mechanisms (e.g., rewards, gamification, referral programs) to drive engagement and conversion during events.

title: Senior Growth Community Engagement (User Acquisition) - Marketing, Shopee
description:
1. Funnel Performance Planning & Vendor Alignment
Translate New Buyer & KOC funnel goals (acquisition, activation, retention) into clear project strategies and execution plans.
Align KPIs, deliverables, and success metrics with vendors to ensure outcomes are achieved across all funnel stages.
2. Program Performance & Vendor Management
Develop data-driven strategies and success metrics for both online and offline growth initiatives aligned with New Buyer & KOC acquisition objectives.
Monitor program performance across key funnel metrics, identify optimization opportunities, and translate insights into actionable improvement plans.
Manage vendor performance to ensure initiatives are delivered effectively and achieve agreed KPIs and business objectives.
3. User Journey & Engagement Optimization
Design seamless user journeys across both online communities and offline initiatives to maximize New Buyer & KOC acquisition, activation, and retention.
Identify friction points across user touchpoints and optimize engagement mechanics to improve conversion and retention.
Standardize best practices and scalable engagement models based on program performance and user insights.
4+ years of experience in Project Management or Consulting background.
Experience working cross-functionally with internal teams (e.g., Marketing,Product, BI, Compliance)
Strong communication skills in both English and Vietnamese, especially in vendor management and stakeholder alignment
High ownership mindset, proactive attitude, and ability to work under pressure in fast-paced environments
Detail-oriented with strong execution capabilities
Good proficiency in Microsoft Excel, Google Sheets, and Google Slides for planning, tracking, and reporting
Experience in organizing large-scale Acquisition online/offline events (e.g., campus activations, roadshows,...)
Basic analytical skills, with the ability to understand funnel performance and optimize event outcomes
Exposure to acquisition campaigns or growth-related projects
Familiarity with incentive mechanisms (e.g., rewards, gamification, referral programs) to drive engagement and conversion during events.

title: Merchant Strategy Manager, Merchant Planning
description:
Develop and execute strategic plans to achieve business objectives, focusing on merchant growth, investment, and performance improvement.
Analyze market trends, competitor strategies, and internal performance data to identify opportunities and recommend actionable strategies.
Design and implement initiatives to optimize merchant acquisition, and monetization across various market segments.
Collaborate cross-functionally with BD, Marketing, and Operations teams to align on goals and deploy effective strategies.
Monitor key performance metrics, generate insights, and prepare regular reports for management to ensure strategy effectiveness.
Min 7 years experience in Data analysis/ Business analysis/ Strategy planning or consulting.
Strong analytical skills with proficiency in data visualization and tools such as Excel, Tableau, SQL, or equivalent.
Leadership: Experience mentoring and leading teams, fostering a culture of growth and continuous improvement.
Excellent communication, presentation, and stakeholder management skills with the ability to influence cross-functional teams.
Self-driven, adaptable to a fast-paced environment, and passionate about problem-solving and continuous improvement.

title: Fulfillment Project Management Lead - Shopee
description:
1. Business & PnL Management
Manage end-to-end commercial & financial performance of Retail program, balancing topline growth and bottom-line efficiency
Translate business priorities into clear weekly and monthly execution plans, ensuring consistent delivery against performance targets (ADO, ADG, PnL)
Drive Pricing & Promotion strategy and execution for Retail program, ensuring topline growth and bottom-line profitability
Coordinate with cross-functional teams (BD, BI, Marketing, Ops) to ensure seamless execution and timing adherence
2. Business Performance Analytics
Monitor and analyze key performance metrics (e.g., traffic, conversion, CIR) to identify gaps and opportunities
Conduct deep-dive analysis on underperforming areas and drive data-backed action plans to improve business outcomes
Develop and maintain dashboards and reports to track business health and support decision-making
Provide regular performance insights and recommendations to stakeholders to drive continuous optimization
3. Process Management
Partner with Product, Engineering, and Operations teams to support Retail-related product and process improvements
Identify workflow gaps and lead initiatives to enhance operational efficiency, scalability, and execution quality
Drive standardization and optimization of key processes across Retail shop operations
Ensure operational readiness and smooth rollout of new initiatives, features, or programs
4. Team Leadership & Stakeholder Management
Lead and develop a high-performing team, fostering strong ownership, accountability, and execution excellence
Align and influence cross-functional stakeholders to drive shared business goals
Build scalable frameworks and ways of working to support long-term Retail growth
Other tasks as assigned
5+ years of relevant experience in commercial growth, strategy planning, management consultant
Strong problem-solving and strategic thinking
Self-driven, organized, and able to lead cross-team work
Excellent communication and project management skills
Background in e-commerce or cross-functional projects is highly preferred

title: Supply Chain Performance Management - SPX Express
description:
Project scopes within end-to-end supply chain functions:
Demand/Supply Planning: Control demand & supply planning process to ensure closed-gap and keep backlogs within manageable levels during peak and critical periods (e.g., big campaigns, holidays, force majeure events).
Network Optimization: Conduct analysis and lead implementation initiatives to optimize distribution center placement, transportation routing, and overall supply chain network design - improving lead time, service quality, and cost efficiency..
Delivery Speed & Cost Optimization: Drive projects that accelerate last-mile delivery, optimize transportation costs, improve delivery success rates, and enhance overall customer experience.
Proactively communicate with cross functions operation team to ensure quick problem-solving process when operation constraint.
2. Performance Management & Tracking:
Develop and implement robust metrics and KPIs to track the performance of ongoing projects and the overall effectiveness of specific supply chain functions post-implementation.
Collect, analyze, and interpret performance data to generate actionable insights and identify areas for further optimization.
Prepare and present clear, data-driven reports and dashboards on project health, benefits realization, and functional performance to senior management and stakeholders.
Organize and facilitate project meetings, capture accurate minutes, and track action items to completion.
Bachelor’s degree in Supply Chain, Business, Engineering, Economics, or related fields.
3+ years of experience in supply chain, operations, consulting, analytics, or similar roles.
Strong problem-solving and logical thinking skills, able to break down complex problems and structure clear solutions
Ability to connect the dots across data, operations, and business context
Resilient and proactive, comfortable working in a fast-changing and sometimes ambiguous environment
Eager to learn and adaptable, with a strong willingness to challenge existing ways of working and drive change
Strong analytical mindset with experience working with data and KPIs, complemented by advanced Excel skills.
Good written and verbal communication skills in English and Vietnamese to coordinate with stakeholders from across the region.

Drive strategic projects related to KR Local Shop expansion.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams including Marketing, Operations, Product, Livestream, Affiliate, and Logistics.
Analyze category trends, competitive landscape, and growth opportunities.
2~5 years of experience in Business Development, Sales, Account Management, E-commerce, Consulting, or related fields.
Korean and English business proficiency.
Strong communication and stakeholder management skills.
Strong commercial mindset and ownership.
Ability to work independently in a fast-paced environment.
Comfortable working with data and performance metrics.

Korean nationals currently based in Vietnam
Experience in e-commerce, marketplaces, creator economy, or digital commerce.
Experience working with brands, distributors, or agencies.
Experience in seller acquisition or merchant onboarding.

title: Operations Trainer (Bac Ninh/ Binh Duong) - SPX Express
description:
1.Training Design and Development:
Conduct training needs assessments through observations, interviews, and performance evaluations.
Review and enhance existing training materials to ensure relevance to current warehouse processes and standards.
2.Training Delivery:
Facilitate hands-on training sessions and workshops for warehouse staff on operational procedures, safety protocols, and best practices.
Conduct functional training sessions for Supervisors and Leads when required.
Apply a variety of training techniques (e.g., simulations, role-plays, on-the-job coaching) to maximize engagement and learning outcomes.
Ensure sessions are interactive, practical, and well-aligned with warehouse schedules.
3.Evaluation and Improvement:
Continuously refine training content and methods based on participant feedback and changing business needs.
Ensure accurate records of attendance, assessments, and results for reporting purposes.
Prepare training reports (e.g. monthly, quarterly, yearly) as required.
4.Collaboration and Support:
Partner with warehouse managers and team leads to identify and plan training needs and schedules.
Stay updated on best practices and trends in warehouse operations and adult learning methodologies.
Safety and Compliance:
Ensure all training programs comply with Shopee’s policies and relevant safety regulations.
Foster a strong safety culture and encourage continuous improvement in operational practices.
Working location: Bac Ninh & Binh Duong
Bachelor’s degree in Logistics, Supply Chain Management, Human Resources, or a related field with 3+ years of experience in training, preferably in warehouse operations or logistics.
Strong understanding of warehouse processes and operations.
Excellent presentation and communication skills, with the ability to engage diverse audiences.
Proficient in training methodologies.
Ability to assess training needs and develop tailored training solutions.
Proficient in Microsoft Office and Google Workspace, especially Google Sheets and Google Slides.
Be able to deliver training to big groups of staff in short time with minimum resources
Willing to travel to other warehouse sites to conduct training when required (low frequency).
Strong organizational and time-management skills.
Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
Passion for continuous learning and development.
Adaptable, proactive, and open to feedback.
Able to stay calm and maintain professionalism under pressure.

title: Senior Operations Training Design & Development Associate - SPX Express
description:
1. Learning Solution Design
Partner with the Analysis & Evaluation team and business stakeholders to identify capability gaps and training requirements.
Design training programs, learning journeys, and learning solutions tailored to different target audiences.
Develop course outlines, curriculum structures, learning objectives, and learning assessment strategies.
Design learner-centered learning experiences aligned with job requirements and business objectives.
Recommend appropriate learning approaches, including classroom training, on-the-job training (OJT), blended learning, e-learning, and self-directed learning.
2. Learning Content Design & Development
Lead the design, development, and standardization of learning materials, including Presentation Slides, Workbooks, Facilitator Guides, Assessments, Videos, Job Aids, and E-learning modules.
Ensure learning materials are practical, easy to understand, easy to facilitate, and suitable for the target audience.
Transform operational processes, SOPs, technical knowledge, and best practices into effective learning content.
Establish and manage a centralized learning content repository to maximize reusability and maintain consistency across the organization.
Review, validate, and approve learning materials prior to deployment.
3. Learning Development Project Management
Plan, allocate resources, and manage the timeline of learning design and development projects.
Collaborate with Subject Matter Experts (SMEs), business functions, and training implementation teams throughout the development lifecycle.
Monitor deliverable quality and ensure training programs and learning materials are completed on schedule and meet quality standards.
Establish standards, processes, templates, and best practices to standardize learning design and development activities.
4. Continuous Improvement & Innovation
Leverage feedback from learners, Trainers, and stakeholders to continuously improve training programs and learning materials.
Regularly update learning content to reflect changes in business processes, operations, and organizational priorities.
Research and apply emerging trends in Instructional Design, Digital Learning, Learning Experience Design (LXD), and AI-enabled learning solutions.
Recommend initiatives to enhance learner experience, learning effectiveness, and post-training application.
Drive the standardization and optimization of learning materials that can be deployed consistently across warehouses nationwide.
Bachelor’s degree in Education, Human Resources, Business Administration, Logistics, Supply Chain Management, or related disciplines with 3+ years of experience in Learning & Development, Training, Capability Development, or Instructional Design.
Experience managing learning projects or leading learning design initiatives is a plus.
Strong project management and multi-tasking capabilities.
Excellent content writing, curriculum development, and communication skills.
Ability to collaborate effectively with Subject Matter Experts (SMEs) and cross-functional stakeholders.
Strong analytical thinking, problem-solving, and continuous improvement mindset.
Proficiency in learning content development tools and the application of AI in learning design and content creation.

title: Sourcing Lead - Shopee
description:
1) Strategic sourcing
Execute and improve procurement processes to support for further improvement on sustainable and effective business growth, including vendor sourcing, vendor assessment and selection, to contracting, purchasing and payments
Ensuring the procurement terms and conditions agreed with vendors (delivery terms, payment terms, etc.)
Ensure the procurement of services/products is correct in quantity and quality according to business’s requirements
2) Supplier & Vendor relationship management
Maintain strong and regular communication with all suppliers
Proactively collaborate with suppliers to make them partnership together to develop strategy for long-term relationship and getting more benefits to support sustainable business growth.
Maintain satisfactory and mutually beneficial relationships with suppliers by conducting business in an ethical and fair manner to create and preserve a favorable company image
Provide inputs to evaluate supplier performance through audit & KPI and recommend potential supplier rating in accordance with Procurement policy & processes
3) Category management
Develop long-term sourcing strategy for procurement categories in line with company strategy and supply chain strategy to optimize total spend for the whole Group.
Proactively collaborate with the Procurement Strategy & Planning team to analyze all current and future requirements, market trends and suppliers’ capability to evaluate opportunities and risks for new sourcing.
Analyse market data, consumer insights and competitor activities to make informed decisions regarding product selection, assortment, pricing, promotions and inventory management.
Bachelor's degree in Supply Chain Management, Business Administration, Economics, International Trade, or a related field.
Minimum 7 years of progressive experience in Procurement, Strategic Sourcing, with significant experience in a senior procurement leadership role.
Proven experience in Warehouse Procurement or Supply Chain Operations within multinational organizations is highly preferred.
Ability to liaise with internal and external stakeholders and win hearts & minds whilst delivering on hard targets
Business Analytics, Analytical Thinking, Presentation
Negotiation & Problem Solving & Decision Making & Project Management
Highly motivated with a desire to learn
Attention to detail, the ability to multitask
Be opened, flexible and enjoyed fast-paced environment

title: [SPX Express] Senior Associate, Business Product Management (AI Solutions)
description:
1. Process Discovery & Optimization (BPM Core)
Analyze end-to-end business processes (As-is vs To-be) across Workforce, Finance, Risk & Back Office.
Identify bottlenecks, inefficiencies, and automation opportunities.
Break down complex business problems into structured, solvable components.
Redesign workflows with a product mindset, focusing on user experience (Ops, staff, stakeholders).
2. . AI-Driven Solution Design
Design AI-powered solutions to enhance workflows:
+ Generative AI for content automation (reporting, communication, documentation)
+ Predictive analytics for risk detection, forecasting, anomaly detection
Define AI workflows (input → decision → output → fallback → feedback loop).
Build and orchestrate AI agents / bots for automation across processes.
3. Data-Driven Problem Solving
Analyze operational data to identify root causes and improvement opportunities.
Translate data insights into actionable AI use cases.
Define success metrics: automation rate, time saved, accuracy improvement, cost reduction.
4. AI Workflow & Tool Integration
Leverage AI tools and platforms to build scalable solutions: AI APIs, LLMs, automation tools, workflow engines
Integrate AI into existing systems (Ops tools, Finance systems, Risk platforms).
Design reusable AI components for cross-domain scalability.
5. Change Management & Adoption
Drive adoption of AI-powered workflows across teams.
Train and enable stakeholders (Ops, Finance, Risk teams).
Communicate clearly the value and impact of AI transformation.
Manage resistance and ensure smooth transition from manual to automated processes.
6. Risk, Compliance & AI Governance
Ensure AI solutions comply with:
+ Data privacy (PII protection)
+ Internal compliance frameworks
+ Ethical AI standards
Design guardrails: thresholds, fallback logic, audit logs, human-in-the-loop.
Work closely with Risk & Security teams to ensure safe deployment.
Must have
Product Mindset: Apply user-centric principles to transform complex back-office workflows into functional products.
Data-Driven Analysis: Utilize advanced analytical tools to identify operational bottlenecks and enhance system efficiency.
AI Solution Design: Design innovative AI frameworks to automate manual finance and risk management processes.
Quick Learning: Adapt rapidly to evolving technologies and specialized domain knowledge within the industry.
Nice to have
Experience in Logistics / Workforce / Finance Ops
Exposure to AI platform or internal tool building
Familiarity with data tools (SQL, dashboards, analytics)
Experience with automation platforms
